name: Merchant Madison
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'downtown madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sheri Mazariegos', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116137378980185648530/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7H7PqqjbKrVFFnd3BHOZMTrQHbytALTjIrD0TBgTSvhBVB7-OA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Loved the general vibe of this place - decor and outdoor seating were great. Everyone that we encountered at Merchant were really welcoming and helpful - from the hostess to our waitress. We sat outdoors, which was really refreshing, could see the water at the end of the street.

The food was good, but not really 5 star worthy. The only item that we thought was memorably delicious were the deviled eggs - if you go, definitely give them a try. I had the Caesar salad, which I thought lacked taste and skimpy on dressing. My husband had the Friday fish fry - it wasn’t the traditional Wisconsin fish fry (cod and hash brown side) - it was sturgeon and seasoned fries. He said it was good - and the seasoned fries were delicious.

Street parking was tricky to find - fun area, lots of places, fun to walk around after and one street away from the capitol building - beautiful at night!', 'time': 1755008649, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Yuki', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113773529473312037999/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJkXQoJMS61KvZ-SqGzRZ-CWICY5tH-mBI1jU5l0cpDMNocDA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Amazing atmosphere and great happy hour options. The cheese curds with hot honey and the crispy fries were delicious. Service was a bit slow and could be more attentive, but overall the food made it a good experience.', 'time': 1763730807, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Felicia Chang', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117663647922271524540/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz9p8rb1eXxQRa5HVv778ZoKRp3-Ow7gZjpjLOrMWtSMJrVgL1=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Stopped by for some drinks and snacks on a Saturday night. name: The Harvey House
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Grace SHEN', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100393307240619154972/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVBovhJRSSl0rDxaQ_5VVH9o-nb-Azv3d_KOkmS-xSrVvMoHjxSg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'My husband and I came here for the first time to celebrate my birthday earlier this month. For a restaurant located close to downtown, having parking right at the entrance was such a pleasant surprise.

We were seated in a dining hall converted from a train car, which truly felt like dining aboard the Orient Express—such a fun and unique experience. Every staff member we interacted with, whether directly serving us or not, was incredibly friendly and greeted us with warm smiles. Especially during the cold winter season, the entire dining experience felt welcoming and wonderful from start to finish.

For our main courses, we ordered the walleye and the steak—both were absolutely delicious! I especially loved the dipping sauce that came with the walleye; the touch of mustard made it stand out for me.

Thank you to every member of the staff. We will definitely be back and bring more friends next time!', 'time': 1765914024, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Marcelo Polanco', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107788908461509917312/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSTKSl-0QkzKEdtSZ7oqI8_ctiuHVirBxx3kXrvDRyGh29uw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Swung by right after opening on a Wednesday and the experience right off the bat was excellent. Hostess set the bar high by saying that my server is her favorite server when she eats there and the server Zoe was phenomenal.

Loved seeing the passion and authentic enthusiasm in her face when she spoke of the food; she answered all my questions made me genuinely excited and giddy to eat. The salmon was excellent, perfectly fluffy and moist and the skin was PERFECTLY crispy.

Excellent customer service from all other waitstaff, can’t wait to be back in Madison to eat here again.', 'time': 1763036181, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Benjamin Hammer', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117209078428870872627/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1kKJfTnioOfQkRI6ZNX5oosT0mJAbH6AlFwtcltqPGjr4mH_O=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Really pleasant dinner at The Harvey House a few weeks ago.  The crudite platter was good BUT the green goddess dip was borderline tasteless.  I’d recommend some salt and more punchy herbs.  The fish entree was spectacular and unlike anything I had ever had, truly a showstopper.  Drinks were well made, and our waiter was so on top of it coming with ice cold glasses halfway through our martinis.  I would definitely recommend and revisit.', 'time': 1763586345, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Brandon Wisneski', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114793517548808420516/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiRpJnT_aEufwpdDvyuT84oHKnoBghfdRqHzaJBfnpTpQtEw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "Lively atmosphere, impeccable service, beautiful building, and a creative, elevated take on Wisconsin supper club dishes. Great place for date night, business dinner, or special occasion. Service couldn't have been friendlier from the moment we walked in. Walleye with spatzle and horseradish was the star for me. I admit to being somewhat skeptical of the $18 relish tray, (which is often included in the price of dinner at a traditional supper club), but it was huge and the presentation was stunning. Would definitely return. Free parking onsite. Reservations recommended.", 'time': 1759517522, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Paul Steltenpohl (BP Legend)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111407905628168061368/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXqFagD1MEvbrfxQy0TDohhy4w4Ym63Tt3R7PBWp47QAfQew=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Hidden excellence!  Hey call me Old Fashioned, that's the name of a drink, the place offers a quaint atmosphere with a fantastically different menu.  The Walleye was next level.  The kielbasa in a blanket, truly Wisconsin!  And that chocolate cake, as succulent as your first date!", 'time': 1761707574, 'translated': False}]

name: Graze Restaurant
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Mike Udelhoven', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101073634799437966789/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGti8cPSA1dhc4zu0nindi0xGHcGVddakURTgcYdockvpZCKZa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'in the last week', 'text': 'My fiancé and I were in town for a show, and I had a serious craving for Korean fried chicken. Naturally, we followed our stomachs to Graze Restaurant. Between the glowing reviews and the fact that it’s run by a James Beard Award–winning chef, it felt like the universe was gently but firmly pointing us there.

Our entrance was… concerning. lol An alarm was going off as we walked in. Turns out a water line had broken in the neighboring building. We made the most of it and shimmy danced to the strobe light and alarm.

Once seated, we ordered the Eggs Benedict and the Korean Fried Chicken & Waffle.

The Eggs Benedict came out with a perfectly poached egg, and the addition of a Dijon vinaigrette was something new for me — bright, tangy, and honestly such a great surprise twist.

The Korean Fried Chicken & Waffle was the star of the meal. The chicken was beautifully cooked, crispy outside, juicy inside, and that honey garlic gochujang glaze? Sweet, savory, just enough heat… the kind of flavor that makes you pause mid-bite and look at your partner like, “yoooooo!"

We devoured both dishes and left stuffed and happy. 10/10 recommend this place.', 'time': 1771366097, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Donald K. Barker', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117604754372773055886/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7DGWQEkVH_WQ2JqqrK0hILtVNmlgYjXdr9Lg0g9gr6SIZ_AM=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'After finishing the Madison Marathon, we decided to come by for brunch and it was exactly what we needed. The atmosphere was relaxed and welcoming, and the staff took great care of us from the moment we arrived. Once we checked in, we were promptly shown to our table and made comfortable right away. It was a perfect post-race stop with attentive service and a pleasant overall experience.', 'time': 1770199419, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Cooper Vittetoe', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110887805816267140917/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPaaO3PJ4MrsLBvml-QIG8KAG0aH_2MWz8O8v74RXcLxnZTCw-=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'Went in for brunch on a Saturday morning. Excellent food and speedy service! An amazing blend of Korean food and brunch! Would highly recommend on a beautiful Madison weekend!', 'time': 1770653680, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Joshua Hartlep', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113535251863729492211/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpnEChMKZfbZx6ZpUYbAwVogOU9U1KDle85eTBqbKZrbvE6uc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'They were fully booked for brunch so we had to sit at the bar which was fine. The view is amazing in there and overall vibes were great. Obviously pricy but worth it for the experience! I really wanted to try more things on the menu but I went with the loaded hash brown and my girlfriend got the smash burger which was amazing. In the future I’d love to try the Korean dishes and the cheese curds. Also, the bacon egg & cheese egg roll was really unique and it was amazing with the crunch on the outside. Go here!', 'time': 1755630023, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Gaurav Gulati', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111318662923694030728/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXM3quB7Ca88uyxEZzik44ayShWG-ou7n2d8ZOJ5aKngJLJmFxX=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'While visiting Madison, we called in last minute to see if they could accommodate, party of 2, and they were about to get us in at the bar top. Everything about the experience was delightful. Great building space, great views of Capitol building, very inviting and cozy interior, chill vibe, excellent service, and food was cooked to perfection and was everything was very delicious!!

Although everything was delectable, the stars of the show were Roasted Beets salad, and Basque cake dessert - Sooooo goooooood!!!

They were packed on Fri night. Make sure to call in reservations, or hope to find a seat at the bar top

Here what we ordered for 2:

Roasted Beets Salad: 11/10
Dream Farm chèvre, market green and yellow beans,
pickled Kissed by the Sun blueberries, spicy yuzu vinaigrette,
roasted macadamia nuts

Dolsot Bibimbap: 9.5/10
7 Seeds Farm Organic Pork Bulgogi
crispy fried rice, spinach muchim, market vegetables, kimchi,
spicy gochujang sauce, sunny side up egg*
served in a hot stone bowl

Graze Burger*: 9.6/10
three-meat patty*: brisket, short rib, and bacon;
caramelized onion-Cabernet jus, Swiss compound butter,
garlic aioli*, sesame duck fat bun
Side Choice: Fries

Basque Cake: 11/10
Kissed by the Sun door county Cherry compote,
sour cream ice cream', 'time': 1758339349, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sameer Khan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104271517097365110704/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_hQjFFMF8PxnnaoX-vssQAgBIx1vR6vlabc0O7mJFtZpa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Parents came into town and we wanted to try this place for the first time. The location is right in the heart of downtown near the capitol square. The staff were super friendly, and seated us right away. We had an option to sit “inside” at the bar, or “on the porch” which was more like the center of the building, or outside on the patio. We chose “on the porch” which was the middle of what looked like an old office building with a skylight and tasteful decorations to make you feel like you’re outside without being outside. Was actually kind of cool.

We ordered cheese curds for apps. Honestly, at first I thought the texture was a bit soft/mushie but they really grew on me. The rest of the family agreed. They came out super fast but were still fresh and hot.

Same with the food, our burgers came out like 5 minutes after we ordered. The burger was actually phenomenal, no complaints. Ingredients tasted fresh and there was just the right amount of salt in the meat. Potato bun was nice and fluffy.

The 4 stars comes from the fries. Don’t get me wrong, nothing to complain about the fries themselves. Actually, they were salted, shaped, and crisped exactly like McDonald’s fries. Never seen another restaurant get so close to Macca’s fries, so we’re kind of impressed. But the knocked star: the burger is already $15. Just the burger. And then you pay $5 more just to get fries added on. The burger and fries are good… but $20 good? Nahhh. And it’s on the smaller side too.

Would I recommend this place? Absolutely. I’ll probably end up back at some point myself. Just eat a snack before going and expect to pay $20 for a tummy tickler, and this place is spot on.', 'time': 1760322372, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Susan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106925353520185544265/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXruJvs5MOeJsxTBsKiFqi0ZTq5bdeEXDNHJxOTFJFbSaFTR4s=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'The best place to eat/drink in Madison especially if you are a vegetarian/pescatarian. So crispy and perfectly spiced. My husband had the fish sandwich. It was crispy, perfectly cooked and has this killer red cabbage coleslaw. The fries as super crispy and come with a great sauce. We went there for lunch. name: Eno Vino Downtown
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Peng-Sue Vang', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109180776752072328572/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWqdX9L_BzxkbXN5AwNG_Mynm1mvBrpX2Y7UdmxW-reZmvyQE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Eno Vino offers a stunning atmosphere with panoramic views of the Capital that truly elevate the dining experience.

The ambiance is upscale and perfect for a special night out or a celebratory occasion.
However, when it comes to the food, portions are noticeably small. While the dishes are beautifully presented and flavorful, you’ll likely need to order multiple plates to feel satisfied. This can quickly add up, making the overall value questionable given the price point.

Eno Vino is worth visiting for the ambiance and view alone, but if you're looking for a filling meal or value for money, it might not be the best choice. A good experience overall—but not one I’d strongly recommend based on portion size and pricing.", 'time': 1761692714, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Caitlin Simmonds', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110118158974099475832/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7MeShpWwFMjzMhw8CxcWe-LOfg8TWTChtiQI9ERJSSLB97gwvMg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "This establishment provides a magnificent view of the capital, which is particularly radiant at night. The cuisine is exceptional. These attributes, among others, contribute to the restaurant's high demand. I advise making reservations several days in advance. A parking garage is conveniently located nearby. We highly recommend a visit.", 'time': 1761442770, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Al Bunshaft', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111695929896050171851/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFJre8iIYqjWytAdabxB8lzN8Vs_AjAcb1Dx0M9t659alCLoAsdQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Four of us had dinner here on Sunday evening. We were seated on time in a full dining room at a table with a nice view of the Capitol. They suggested 2 to 3 dishes per person. It’s already a pricey place (maybe my only negative comment and the reason I gave the food 4 stars) and that would have been too much food and really increase the bill.

We started with the cheese plate and some bruschetta. Highly recommend the “bruléed”goat cheese. Others were good. That one was delicious. Best bruschetta was the salmon. We then had the green beans flambé, the calamari fries, the Brussels sprouts and finally the pumpkin spice risotto. We loved everything except the risotto, which was too sweet and not a flavor that we liked. We ended with the chocolate fondue dessert.

Oh, we started with some very nice cocktails including the TJ Henry smoked Old-Fashioned.

Our server was friendly and knowledgeable. The food came promptly, was generally delicious and well-prepared.

Recommended, but expensive for what it is. Our bill with tip for 6 dishes plus one dessert was around $240 for 4 people. They suggested we order 8 to 12 dishes. The bill would have been even more!', 'time': 1759787856, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'This is my second visit to Eno Vino and definitely enjoyed the second time a lot more than the first , and for that reason I am posting a detailed review .

Made reservations in advance which is a must and highly recommended. The location and especially the gorgeous view of this place is what attracts so many people here . Combined with the excellent tapas styled food it’s a worthy destination.

As opposed to the previous time I was here it was less loud and noisy which I appreciated . We were greeted and taken to our table . Service was good and our server explained the menu and concept .

Cocktails are extraordinarily good . So good you cannot just have one . We got the green goddess with gin which was refreshing and the smoked J Henry old fashioned which is out of this world . Expensive cocktails , but so good . The dishes we decided on were four to go around and share .

Salad green with apples and grapes topped with prosciutto and a light vinaigrette that tied it all together . Very light and a good start . Roasted beets were well prepared and goat cheese on the side also nicely balanced and light . The pistachio& pea risotto although it looked heavy was not as rich as one would expect but had the right amount of ingredients to not make it too heavy . Really enjoyed this . Finally the chicken thigh kebabs with smashed fingerling potatoes and an avocado thick purée sauce was a good dish .

Overall the food met our expectations and the menu has great potential for tasting many different style of cooking and cuisines.

Service was good but you can’t help noticing that they are slightly understaffed . Perhaps it’s the time of year where it’s hard to get more people in to help . Despite this our server did a good job .

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Brittany Renault', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104505343001216852088/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAYfoHivcCWgnmZbslwAIiK9lDBg09X_TV-GXXTnsz2M5jWA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "I have been here many times before and things have been great, especially the food. We came in on an empty night so the atmosphere was nice. The lighting is so beautiful in this restaurant and the music is always great while also having a variety. Our drinks were great! My husband got the black momba and I just had a ginger beer. Since we were one of the only tables you would think we would have gotten our food pretty quickly but it took a while, my husband's ribs were cold. He didn't say anything because he doesn't typically, but then the server was also a bit slow to get us our bill. I know its a relaxed place but there just still wasn't very quick service. I would still go back but just had to be honest.", 'time': 1758857559, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Craig W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110336980874976649018/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs_O3YsDRNtlnnQBD_gBh21ilwIq6nXb74iFKmgzstUyOBhry5=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "The Weary Traveler Freehouse is just what I expected from a restaurant and bar on Willy Street. A cousin in France read a New York Times (I think) review of Madison's restaurants recently and this was one of two that appealed to me and is within walking distance from home. I arrived at 1 PM on a Friday and found the place about half full. I ordered the Eggs Benny which came with chips, salad, a pickle and wedge of orange. The eggs benny had perfect poached eggs and was easy to cut into bite-sized pieces. I will return. The sound level was quite high, even though the occupancy was around 50% but conversations at a table may not a problem. I was surprised that my cup of coffee was $6 but I was offered a refill twice by a pleasant server. The tin ceiling probably adds to the sound level but is spectacular and worth the loudness of diners.", 'time': 1763848036, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jonathan W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101323607714810197076/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0q3idTNmqmq7HLlm0UN21cwC26HBFNts8F0snBMrbaO9Z7Is=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "Great place to stop, have a bite and a drink. The slider I had was delicious with cream cheese and jalapeños, with the fries being okay, well seasoned but the texture wasn't what I wanted.

The highlight was the great service and cocktails. Quinton (sorry if I butchered the spelling) was a good bartender who made great cocktails. If your weary from your travels check this place out to lift your spirits.", 'time': 1757163034, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Yael Jimenez', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116259077673893754768/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuiZr8eptPOUhsagvvFKaAoAxrupeXVbt2F3SvjdOQB89Hnk4pow=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "I've been coming here for years as a Madison native. I only had great things to say about this place until the last couple of times I've gone to eat.

The only reason I'm not giving 5 starts is because the last couple times I've gotten the Hungarian goulash it's been mostly broth. I understand the economy is tough but this will only serve to alienate local clientele that has been coming here.

Additionally why did they change giving the vinaigrette on the side in a to go cup? I got home (mind you I live close) and the salad was all soggy.
Go back please!

Honestly I think it's a testament and epitome of if it's not broke don't fix it. This place was perfect 5/5 but with the recent changes I just can't give it perfect.

That being said the OG Bob's bad breath burger is still insanely perfect. Drinks are always 10/10 and the atmosphere is always great. I do miss the bulgogi flatbread but alas I know things got to get switched up so no demerit there.

Moreover, I don't mind the price increase (desert 8$ vs 5$) I get it but I would get it even more if everything was just perfect like I know it could be because it has been for years.

Overall great spot with great staff, food and drinks.
Looking forward to giving the goulash a 3rd and final attempt for redemption 😄", 'time': 1768136728, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'DeeAnn Martin (Dee)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111659868411874308176/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUhm5eMXW1-brS34Cunwzzeq_gT_6CnuWVGyt_rSIFe96ejQsrAA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Love the atmosphere here... fabulous people and delicious food. Great senses of humor! My friend ordered a beer, and he made it clear, "No frosted glass, no salted rim, no lemon, no salad, just a beer." He got the plain beer - perfectly poured! ... AND a small glass of beer on the side with a sprig of mint on a toothpick! 🤭 After a moment of confusion, we laughed! 🤩🤣 The bartender played a silly, gentle prank on my friend, about the "no salad" comment - hilarious! Fabulous vibe here, highly recommend. 🙋💚💚💚', 'time': 1761140291, 'translated': False}]

We started with some good cheese curds, which were a promising start. Isabelle was our server and she explained some items on the menu, which I had questions about.  For my main, I decided on the pork belly mac and cheese (without blue cheese) after much deliberation. Sadly, after a rather long wait, the dish was a major letdown. Absolutely loved this experience! Highly recommend!", 'time': 1765419455, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Sarah', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114272202896119227518/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1HnBtUHteolPXGmkltCuyTkg_x5NZDv59eYReQUMKMTcRwdw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': "This was not my first time at L'Etoile, as we've been several times since moving to Madison about a year and a half ago. I have been meaning to leave a review! We typically opt for the tasting menu with the wine pairing, and it never disappoints. The ambiance is exceptional, with a stunning view of Madison’s Capitol building.

One of the highlights is the sommelier—he is an incredible storyteller and takes the time to answer any questions we have about the wines. The waitstaff is always professional and attentive, adding to the overall experience.

We’re already looking forward to our next visit at the end of the month!

Here are a few photos from our most recent meal.", 'time': 1738622301, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Edward Alan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108675044755462381469/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2GFN_lMm0VDJ2SeJYSCihwnhguJJbq9oj_2TOKWkBT4iZSeUp=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'A Birthday at L’Etoile – Madison’s Star Still Shines Bright

For my birthday this year, my family and I returned to L’Etoile, Madison’s temple of seasonal Midwestern fine dining, and once again it delivered an evening as precise and memorable as any I’ve experienced. From the moment we were greeted with a warm “Happy Birthday, Edward” printed at the top of the tasting menu, it was clear that the team’s attention to detail would extend far beyond the plate.

The service was exemplary—timed to the rhythm of the meal, neither rushed nor lingering. Each course arrived as a perfectly staged moment, the presentation so artful that pausing to admire it felt almost obligatory. I had chosen the grand tasting menu, enhanced by the sommelier’s wine pairings—an indulgence that proved more than worth the additional charge. His selections didn’t just complement the dishes; they deepened them, drawing out flavors I might otherwise have missed.

The Hamachi Crudo en Adobo set the tone—delicate slices of fish accented with sweet corn, creamy avocado, blue corn tostadas for crunch, and a blueberry pico de gallo that provided a surprising pop of tart sweetness.

Next came Ricotta Agnolotti, a dish that balanced rustic warmth with garden freshness. Nestled among ratatouille, capers, and a tender squash blossom, the agnolotti’s creamy filling was lifted by basil’s perfume.

The Boquerones-Crusted Alaskan Halibut was a study in finesse—its golden crust giving way to tender, flaky fish. It was anchored by dashi-braised leeks and potatoes à la Robuchon (silken, butter-rich, and dangerously addictive), with chanterelles and haricots verts adding earth and green snap.

Then, the Pinn-Oak Ridge Lamb Spare Rib Shawarma—aromatic, tender, and served with fava bean falafel, cucumber yogurt, and a sumac-scented onion salad that cut through the lamb’s richness beautifully.

The New York Strip Ribeye course was a carnivore’s finale—perfectly seared, accompanied by smoky Spanish octopus, crispy patatas bravas, and the brightness of sungold tomatoes.

Dessert was a playful yet refined Door County Sweet Cherry Fool—a summer tableau of sweet corn budino, brown sugar corn cake, Thai basil shortbread, and a lace of caramel.

As we left, my family and I agreed: L’Etoile remains unmatched in its ability to make a meal feel like an occasion. It’s not simply about the food, but the way every element—service, pacing, wine, and presentation—converges into an experience greater than the sum of its parts. Next year’s birthday already has a reservation in spirit.', 'time': 1755016606, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Rancorous', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111578845757233642955/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhcg8XYrbPclpuHPtWMj9E8zp0NMiaA2Ksbqn70wqS-xYjf5k=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': "Everything was very good. It's definitely a fine dining atmosphere. Everything from the music to the service was excellent. The food tasted extremely fresh. I opted for the ala cart. You can order as many dishes as you want.", 'time': 1745678759, 'translated': False}]

name: Pink Flamingo Brunch Cafe
reviews: [{'author_name': 'Tambra Riddle', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113368381372696481953/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5pYk2z255RT7_g7epTcwjDiWuX5TdCIxrX1bxdzTZSrNefm7tww=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I was so happy to discover this new place! It used to be Sunroom Cafe, an iconic, busy, sunny little place above State Street, and then got sold during Covid and went downhill. Pink Flamingo has now been here for a couple months and my husband and I went today. I didn’t know what to expect since I still miss Sunroom Cafe so much. But instantly upon opening the door, I could tell it was going to be great. We are both vegan and the menu offers vegan eggs as a substitute to several dishes. I ordered a caramel latte with almond milk (good!) and the Squash Bowl, sub vegan eggs with no sour cream and added avocado. It was SO GOOD! Everything was cooked perfectly, the quinoa was tender and not mushy, a nice proportion of veggies to eggs and potatoes, the avocado was fresh and delicious. It felt great to be here today, sitting next to the window, enjoying the atmosphere… it’s got a great vibe. I also got to meet the owners, they were so sweet and friendly, we chatted for a bit and I can tell they really care about the customers and making a fun dining experience. They even painted the hallways and did a nice job remodeling the bathroom, keeping with the flamingo theme. How fun and cute this place was, I appreciated the vegan accommodations as well. They also seemed open to my suggestion of keeping vegan cheese on hand (easy to keep fresh by freezing and use per request) and I also found out they have vegan chocolate cake! Even tho, as a vegan for over 30 years, I would appreciate the addition of a local vegan pastry or two, I would definitely recommend this place and plan on visiting again and again! It’s sad that Sunroom closed, but I hope this place becomes an iconic part of Madison again; it seems like they have what it takes! Very caring friendly staff as well, making you feel welcomed and that speaks volumes!', 'time': 1759698352, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Vaidehi Patil', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115229243841051748612/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9pP-Q9nZVF-PGSHxnfKU5bVOlWxiquUDWtXJEYX3RCsLRww=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'The food really was excellent (we both got the Chilaquiles with birria) but what really stood out was the customer service. name: Ático Lounge - Madison
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Victoria Repp', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106517818198381030585/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8amOBV1G5IgPtiVcwMC4basAEn1HVjDPUCRklnE3P_5CIVq4Q7w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'We had such a fun experience at Ático Lounge! We started with drinks at the bar, which is absolutely adorable. The bar staff was incredibly attentive and helpful, and honestly the drink menu alone is a reason to visit — tons of tequila options and really unique cocktails. We especially loved the flaming piña coladas!

We had a reservation for Saturday night, but I don’t think it was necessary. It wasn’t overly busy, though I would recommend they add more signage inside the hotel — it took us a minute to figure out where to go. (Tip: it’s on the rooftop of the Moxy Hotel; just head to the top floor.)

All of the food we ordered was excellent. Service was a little slow, but we were dining with friends and didn’t mind the pace at all. One member of our group was gluten-free and the restaurant handled it just fine — we just had to double-check a couple of items since our server was a bit confused when delivering dishes, but she was happy to make sure everything was safe.

Highlights were the ceviche trio, the skewers, and their amazing mole. We ordered a LOT and couldn’t finish everything.

We visited in winter, so the outdoor patio wasn’t open, but it looks like it would be such a fun spot in the summer. Between the rooftop vibes, great food, and fantastic cocktails, this is definitely a place worth returning to!', 'time': 1764515511, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Teodora Paun', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103283344258882747586/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7sUWPevnt55OZEDvisqHaSl3s-UGQyJVkhNxMIXIrJuazekI=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Very professional service.

name: Mint Mark
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'I had been waiting to try Mint Mark for quite some time and had not gotten around to it , until Early in January after the holiday season  decided to make a reservation and try them out .

First and foremost: reservations are highly recommended as they seem to book up very quickly especially over the weekends . Parking was very easy and straightforward inside an enclosed garage which was perfect for winter .

We arrived few minutes earlier and our table was not yet ready so we wondered into the adjacent specialty store and browsed the numerous products and vast array of unique alcohol selection for sale . Cool store.

When we were called for our table our server greeted us and explained the concept of the restaurant. Small plates that come out as the food is prepared . Awesome ! Love the sharing small plate concept when eating out as it allows me to try multiple flavors .

She was extra kind to personally annotate and mark up the menu for us indicating what items were gluten free and what could be modified and what were cross . Greatly appreciated this as it added ease for ordering . Thank you !

And so it began! Cocktails are great . From classics to specialties . We ordered seven different small plates to share and each was delicious in its own way .

Fig & olive spread sets the right tone. Spread on warm toasted bread (not gf) was great. Preserved beets with crème fresh are extra special with a nice pickled aftertaste: what a winner. Cauliflower came recommended from our server and it was excellent. A little salty , semi sweet raisins and crispy cheese . All flavors on the table so far balance and compliment each other well.

Potato sausage Bavarian style with braised red cabbage was a hit. Not on the menu but made for gf was a risotto with sausage . So decadent rich and flavor it could possibly be a staple on this menu . Creamy and warm on a cold night. Finally the steak and frites are a perfectly prepared with an aioli and sauce that brings all flavors together.

More cocktails and all the food on the table makes sense. A delicious dinner with so may flavor profiles . Finally for desert we tried the crème brûlée with a different style burnt sugar on the top . Crème was good but the topping for me was not my favorite .

A great memorable meal and will definitely be back . Many thanks to the staff who added to the experience.', 'time': 1770491064, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'J S', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111353964966756274454/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTa-azyJbbmvhmAKpPUrZBGe-48-5E4z-gYgdrqxx4rujUJJl-=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Signature drink is amazing! name: Lola's Hi/Lo Lounge
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Ted', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104788689828829754455/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIItyqoBZOzFANEDV0WRmFzL7-kqxIBZj3_w0falwC-3V-C4rA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'First visit to Lola's, the former Jacobson Meat Market.  The vibe is Madison hipster, ecelitic but interesting.  Server was nice but her patience was tested by a table of "boomers".  Table enjoyed delicious cheese curds, enjoyed with cocktails and beer.  Dinner was more interesting - baked ziti with delicata, baked ziti with sausage, smash burger, & pan fried pork dumplings.  Ziti was dry yet tasteful.  Dumplings were dry and served "over sauced".  The menu matched the vibe.  Overall an acceptable visit but not too impressed by the contrived attitude and atmosphere.', 'time': 1768753733, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Conor Lawler', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111173118523360342249/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWooaYBZlC0wGjAhStGrPDcXRnIlCtfVqB8LHmKbqF6swwmVLs=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "When it comes to the quality of a business, you can immediately begin to tell based off your first impressions of the interior- the moment you open the second set of doors, you're greeted with a fancy, colorful interior with tons of happy customers and good vibes.

We were immediately seated, and while we were a bit overwhelmed due to it being our first time, the kindness of our server definitely helped us settle in. The drinks are out of this world, and the food matches that perfectly. We got the arancini, the carbonara deviled eggs, a carne asada taco (with pineapple salsa), the beer cheese soup, and the andes mint cheesecake. All were stellar, but my personal favorite of them all was the arancini!

The holiday menu that's currently available is full of delicious food and drinks (including the Cool Runnings and Eggnog Old Fashioned), and I hope to try some more in the future in this gorgeous establishment. You can tell that everyone here is having a blast, and the DJ that's present adds a lot of fun to the music.

Definitely a must try!", 'time': 1765084540, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Eliza B.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107446028525209776940/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaSBrJCZ4ZvHmiWw0HBnAvFLvqUH0DYV7eY5tH0u44oJ6XVtM=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "I loved Lola's Hi/Logout Lounge!!

The atmosphere they have going makes me want to come back despite the opinion that I felt the food didn't blow me away. A very 70s/80s vintage feel to the restaurant.

I had the deviled eggs, not pictured and I was actually disappointed because the pictures made it look so good.
The chicken dumplings were well made and sauced and not very spicy. The spicy dan dan noodles were also not spicy at all and just fine. The smash burger was delicious and the sauce on it was fire. I also liked the homeade ketchup and ranch. The ranch felt more like a garlic sauce to me but I was not upset about that.

The lolas spin was also quite fun!

I would recommend this because of the experience but the I wouldn't overhyped the food. name: The Statehouse
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Somni Moten', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104014989536622326981/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-ce89tDyG_aBX9QSZBtGWWJz4TjFbuc5R1UtHx5_IH5HSIFgK=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'I went here for Thanksgiving dinner, and it was spectacular. The calamari had a light batter, not overly thick breading. The Shirley Temple had a grenadine I had never tasted before, but it was not bad. The bread pudding was a little too thick compared to the cream ratio, but it was still excellent. This was my first time trying beef wellington, and it was phenomenal. The steak was cooked perfectly, and they let me substitute the normal sides for the Thanksgiving sides. The stuffing was amazing, as were the brussels sprouts.', 'time': 1766955211, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mimi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105542969490155756911/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdilJ_IMarOkANgr9RWCKChXS0r1-xgUnghEuZjiPHgw6jQH8p=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'I came here for the first time to celebrate a special occasion and left extremely disappointed.

Despite having a reservation, we had to wait about 15 minutes to be seated. The staff blamed it on others customers “camping out,” even though there were many empty tables when we were seated and the restaurant kept getting emptier throughout the night. It felt like a lack of accountability.

Service was slow and inattentive. It took a long time for anyone to take our drink and food order, water was never refilled, had to ask for it, and no one checked in until on our entree until we were almost done eating.

I ordered the $63 beef Wellington, which was the biggest letdown. Although it may look slightly pink in photos, it was not medium rare. It was fully cooked through, dry, and very chewy, similar to braised beef that has turned pink but is overcooked. The pastry was mushy and soggy. This is unacceptable at this price point.

The server also placed the dishes in front of the wrong person without asking, even though there were only two of us. When I asked about the doneness, I was told it is supposed to be medium rare, but then the issue was blamed on a large private party they had that night. They offered to remake it, which would have taken another 40 minutes, or a free dessert. A $13 dessert does not make up for a $63 failed entrée.

This was a special occasion, and the experience fell far short. I will not be returning 100%', 'time': 1770604490, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Adam', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101569543190355770725/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6I4j5xF-6kxa5hUn7KI_Z5r2L5Kaz5rFwfojPVIXbxlr4r7-H=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'We had dinner at The Statehouse in Madison with our family. It’s a beautiful setting with a great view, and most of the food was excellent. However, we had a reservation and still waited over 40 minutes for a table, which was tough with kids. My beef Wellington was almost too chewy to eat, and when I mentioned it to our server, nothing was done. Overall, a nice place but the experience left me on the fence about coming back.', 'time': 1762194085, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Robert Lemons', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106134740200954014838/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqL-atE530vhuacx-03Yq_3-ipGNL8EXUCpZZgI5IN9XrzzIde=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': 'The Statehouse was great!  I will say the atmosphere is a tad on the upscale side and I was definitely not dressed for the occasion.  No worries though, I was still able to sit down and enjoy a great meal.  I stated off with the Chicken Wings in the traditional buffalo sauce followed up with the Roasted Salmon.  Yes, the salmon is half eaten, sometimes I just dig in before I remember to snap a few photos but the wings and salmon were good.  The risotto was OK.  I haven’t had much risotto and I’m beginning to think I’m not mush of a fan.  I finished up my meal with the Autumn Cheesecake and I was expecting a little more from this dessert than I got.  I guess I kept expecting pumpkin cheese cake due to the color but it’s definitely a much or mild and softer cheesecake than what I was expecting.  Overall, I enjoyed The Statehouse and my meal.', 'time': 1743637645, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Weary Traveler', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115836600352353456413/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZWnf9r9b5_xZq5hF5Fu5za6hItd3b9wDtFLl0488Oo1NrhLBxkA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'Celebrated my 1 year anniversary here. reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Rubianto S', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109362277253859708646/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKawYge-5Bzjr2QaflmcE7JvN-MzdlvlR5WfCx7ttM6jRXsvQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'My friend and I were pleasantly surprised by the flavorful food in this restaurant. We were actually going to another restaurant, but it was completely full, so we walked to Tipsy Cow instead. This place was also busy but luckily there was a table for two available.

Following Google overview, I ordered the local goat cheese curds for appetizer.  It was yummy 😋

For the main meal, I asked Patrick, our friendly server, for recommendation, and from there I chose spicy steak sandwich. I loved it.  It was soft, warm and delicious!

My friend - who at first thought he was going to get fast food quality meal - also found his lamb tacos to be surprisingly good.

To top it off, I ordered Mexican hot chocolate (a hot liquor). A perfect drink for a freezing winter night! 😃', 'time': 1766525103, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Joshua Fields', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114333042282625349690/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyMl-CZ6YbNJWfdNMts3dhLwuhO_2OLiPuu-84MUH1E9mg2hYOpA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Great post game spot for food and Drinks on a less busy section of town. They features tons of great shareable and sandwiches. The cheese curds were incredible, melt in your mouth and even some great cheese pulls. The Memphis Tots were perfectly seasoned with a great dipping sauce. The PBR battered Walleye was massive, they definitely give you your moneys worth. Service was friendly and quick making this a pleasant experience.', 'time': 1760887908, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mister Bond', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103312614421056715584/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHVyS8mva95DvoqNTafxNRjkwX8u_nSGfyho9PJ7B02_ITeWu7=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Words cannot adequately express our surprise at how delicious everything was. Just a block away from the capital building and a beautiful view. The service was fast and friendly and the food quality was amazing! The onion rings were served with dipping sauces that elevated it to a whole new level. The burgers were fantastic and the clam chowder was hearty and delicious. We will definitely stop and eat here again!', 'time': 1764438821, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Paul Humphrey', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109701213474781754629/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXIW15-9ZfoRJDszyGoOUAjDFEwQoXdj4KtL6DKWdJxUrhfQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Oh boy! The Walleye sandwich was great. I couldn't eat it all. The house made tartar sauce is excellent as well. The fried cheese curds was also a joy to eat. Also had fries with the tipsy aioli is so good, anything you dip into goes from great to jaw dropping.", 'time': 1761703417, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mohammed Hosain', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109803700240729193212/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXbPqnuIiurX3lQQA8yUa1_KN7EhnoTGqSezF3fFi6dB6AmSZW6A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "I didn’t get tipsy from the alcohol, but I definitely fell into a satisfying meat coma after my meal! The food was fantastic overall. I absolutely devoured my three-cheese burger...there was no fuss and no drama, just an incredible combination of juicy meat and rich, melty cheese that made each bite delightful. Our waiter was super friendly. The fries were a pleasant surprise, boasting a perfect balance of crunchiness on the outside and softness on the inside, making them incredibly enjoyable. However, I wasn't particularly a fan of the nachos; the seasoning just didn't appeal to my taste. Loved the place and will be back again.", 'time': 1759782221, 'translated': False}]

name: Everly
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Al Bunshaft', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111695929896050171851/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFJre8iIYqjWytAdabxB8lzN8Vs_AjAcb1Dx0M9t659alCLoAsdQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Ate dinner here because there were good vegetarian options. That was true and the food was generally good.

We started with the fried artichoke which we found was okay. The sauce provided most of the flavor. I would not order this again.

For mains we had the salmon, the grain bowl and the Pozole Verde. The salmon was very good. The grain bowl  was fine, but it’s mostly cold, not a hot meal, if you care about that. I loved the Pozole Verde. Beware that it’s kinda spicy. I thought it was great but others tasted it and found it too hot.

The service was fine until the end when the server took some of the plates away before everyone was finished which is a complaint of mine. Then she gave us the check, took the credit card and returned bill never clearing the dirty plates while we sat there and chatted. It’s fine to the clear the plates when we’re done.

Food was good and we’d go again. Place was clearing out and server was maybe in a rush.', 'time': 1759854070, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Victoria Murphy', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110877248109535616683/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw956qOel-RshP5O0TL6V_QqtiAu_tqOPwJxhbYQilsJyxdJlv=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "This place was fantastic! They had many clearly labeled vegan options. We went on a Sunday around brunch time and there was an hour long wait, so be mindful of that. This place is popular (for a reason) and relatively small inside. I would make a reservation when possible.

The parking lot is small and shared with out businesses, we got lucky by lurking and got a spot as someone left. But if it's busy, expect street parking and a short walk.

Once we got in we were seated and waited on in a timely way. I got their vegan chorizo breakfast burrito. They were unfortunately out of their house made vegan chorizo but the waitstaff was able to sub in their tofu scramble instead for me. That and my hot chai latte were SO GOOD. The fingerling potatoes are something I'm STILL thinking about.

It's a bit pricey here for me, but absolutely somewhere I'd go back to.", 'time': 1763910213, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mariah Cunningham', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101344879187772724677/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyKnS-Ke50QFqZRitRH3T-yoDsYNLxMkvAXq-gxqKDoWHA3SOt=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'I’ve been to Everly a few times before and have never had an experience like this, which is why I feel the need to share.
We waited about 40 minutes for our food, and when it arrived it was lukewarm to cold. I ordered the salmon, and it was difficult to cut through. I’ll be attaching photos, but the fish appeared raw in the middle and was cold, while the outside was warmer.
I asked the waitress whether the salmon was raw or cooked a certain way, and I was told it was cooked medium. Trusting that, I finished the meal and went on with my night.
However, once I got home, I was violently throwing up for hours. I had eaten multiple things that day, and the only food I became sick after was the salmon.
It’s been about 18 hours since I’ve eaten the Salmon and I am still violently vomiting, shaking, and my stomach has been cramping. I was told to go to urgent care but I’m holding off.
I’m very disappointed, especially because I’ve had good experiences here in the past. Serving fish that is undercooked and not properly heated is a serious food safety concern, and I hope this is addressed so it doesn’t happen to someone else.', 'time': 1765741723, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Faith F', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101807808943154388706/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXAFzm20OVnOrp7_mq8LaTrwdGIKHzsficZzSOM71PLCtPUHhgSQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'This is a very cute restaurant with great food. The Parmesan truffle fires were delicious and I highly recommend. The fish tacos were also very delicious, I wish they had more sauce but that’s all I would change. They have a nice area outside for seating, which was perfect for the summer evening. I would definitely come back!', 'time': 1750556074, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Shakita Harrison', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114068832710026245377/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI39eS-uZMVEBSMZ-xiOmnjjK2MXEI-ZRsjeNlKE-zVfjXIAQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'We decided to try this out for the first time and we were not disappointed. Our server was great, the food was great ( I do wish we would have made it for brunch as the menu did shift some) and the location was perfect. They do have outdoor seating options but be prepared for some flies, which I just feel a good pressure wash of the patio would take care of. We also did happen to can’t the happy hour, which was a plus!', 'time': 1752642835, 'translated': False}]

name: Sardine
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Hanna Ramos', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100609855452337707177/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfL-baGXAi4HCDYxJCSKwhxH7TevNdVJctGmwLmwfpnqGXghPbjA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Sardine was absolutely perfect.  We went on a busy Sunday morning- and we had made no reservations!  It was bustling inside.  We got seated immediately at a communal table with the warning that the communal table turns into a reserved table at a certain time.  They also promised that if we were still there when that happened they would move us.  When that time approached the waitstaff smoothly moved us and our stuff to a neighboring two top.
The food!!!  Having worked in a high end patisserie in NYC we had some pretty high standards and Sardine was exceptional.  I felt transported back to NYC and Paris.
The marshmallow on the hot chocolate was incredible.  The oysters were absolutely delicious and sweet.  Our Croque Madams were exactly what we were missing.  Everything was perfect.', 'time': 1764074938, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Robert Robertson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116283271258635194861/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW9ADi3Ssp-OdByp9c5tTgIUNq-ZqLG8SxXySuGQpcQOQQyCs=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': "The food was a bit expensive... but I didn't get the check, however the atmosphere was really nice... PLUS the service was beyond exceptional, superb. Great place for a treat! Reservation recommended!", 'time': 1770507269, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Adreana Tee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102818751669648395199/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVyM-piEwvQVTuw1PAI9Pp0U_4AXtmpEU0kojc5v0lO4LTYJyj=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "This spot holds a very special place in my heart. It's not often that I get to visit but when I do I thoroughly enjoy the service and food quality and taste.  The oysters are a must.  You can do a mix and match set so as to try all that they offer. Out server was very kind and even offered a free sorbet on my birthday.  The sorbet was sooo flavourful and had a little candied lemon on top.  Top notch dessert.  Now to circle back to dinner.   My ribeye served rare was delectable. I went with a salad on the side instead of fries. My only complaint was that the aioli wasn't very garlicky and could've used some more flavor. I can't wait to take my boyfriend here.

Overall.  Exquisite.", 'time': 1765746989, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Marianne Ha', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106193975161230894626/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB3dcHOvEPfcKKxuOga4T_DRRqPoGGDnL65XtsbHnxXMdt8A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Fabulous experience at Sardine - almost everything tasted fresh and well-executed. House salad and pork chop were excellent. We also had the duck dish; I thought the mashed potatoes were a tad too salty and duck would have fared better if less cooked (perhaps a medium rare rather than medium). Extensive drinks list and attentive service too. Overall, a wonderful time and possibly the best restaurant in Madison!', 'time': 1758643172, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Riley Meyers', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106335041375803818099/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9i0peXZkFEJmkCTH3lnGNIR58vTpmMsxsj9vKGAdV2Sfzosmy=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'Went here for our anniversary and had an incredible time! We were sat exactly at our reservation time with a view of the water. Our waiter was extremely kind and always checked in to make sure everything was going well. The food was delicious, we started with the appetizer special and were blown away. Had the Madison sourdough bread as an app as well and we ate the entire basket!
The whitefish and steak were amazing, both very soft and flavorful. Will definitely be back.', 'time': 1753039579, 'translated': False}]

name: Bassett Street Brunch Club
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Mimi Tran', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109612703916490747610/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLD_UlqEb3m330_WmVOpT7enRAAqv-XzMjAwZNYnjeocbzbNWX=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'To preface, our server was great! Super nice and considerate. They were short staffed at the bar and our food came out before the drinks, but she was good at communicating with us and comped part of our drinks. The place itself was cute and trendy.

Gave it a 2 star because of the food. We ordered the poutine, pot roast, fish & chips, chicken & waffles, and chicken salad sandwich. We really liked the poutine. The chicken & waffles was good too, but the rest of it was kind of eh or disappointing. The fried fish didn’t hold any form and fell apart as soon as you touched it. I’m used to pot roasts being very tendered and smothered down, but this one was dry and there wasn’t much of the sauce on the plate to help flavor the dryness out. This part might be a preference thing, but mashed potatoes weren’t super creamy and some of the vegetables didn’t seem like it was fully cooked through. The veggies had a crunch to it that you would expect from a raw one. I also got the pickle margarita, which was kinda fun and unique.

Maybe we should have stuck with the brunch food since it is a brunch club, but the other entrees were kind of a let down.', 'time': 1761492696, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Viggy Vanchi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106908005886548112552/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUelmhXTl9JmJFbiiUVctIqhxA9eNaigNGPajEMr_5LzSlkRfZzHQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Visited here at the recommendation of a recruiter for the company I applied for. [{'author_name': 'Angelique Noel', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110175349381718634958/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaRA8Oac4OGPpxgKfCpugFLGAt9xsG7BRjMWk4G3_eUU5b7g=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'The food was mediocre/decent nothing spectacular but because the service was so bad, it made the food experience drop. My husband went there on his lunch break, the lady at the bar wouldn’t service him. She was rude to him and this is not the first time, him and I came there before, and we were the only black people in there. I didn’t want to think it was a racist environment until the second experience that my husband encounters.
I guess they only want white business and it shows. Word of mouth can either be good for a business or hurt it. I will make sure to spread the word that my kind is not welcome there. It’s other places to eat. They can keep this hole in the wall.', 'time': 1765654811, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Emma', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105258108642236714345/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOpCcBFVxXz5gIAIfvo_KS8Kh0U0etqKydWm1oiglii2OlVw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'I needed somewhere to host a birthday party and the staff could not have been more accommodating. P.S**** = If you are lucky you can see trains passing from the bench on the backside. Enjoy ;)', 'time': 1706751414, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Meyers Shawn', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105093461732679408559/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtQYoHhAlad2HiO1qXlMY1sKud9rMLXszr4_S6ePOcBMsbtjY=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "I recently had the pleasure of visiting The Main Depot Bar in Madison, Wisconsin, while I was traveling for work. I was immediately impressed by the friendly atmosphere and the friendly bartender, who made me feel right at home.

I was able to tell that the bar was a popular spot with the locals, and I could see why. The drinks were delicious, the food was great, and the conversation was flowing. I really enjoyed the atmosphere, and I felt like I was part of the family.

I had a chance to chat with the bartender, who was very friendly and welcoming. He made me a great Old Fashioned, and he gave me some great recommendations for things to do in Madison. I really appreciated his hospitality.

I would highly recommend The Main Depot Bar to anyone looking for a friendly place to have a drink and a bite to eat. It's the perfect place to relax and unwind after a long day.

Here are some specific things I loved about The Main Depot Bar:

The friendly atmosphere.
The friendly bartender.
The delicious drinks and food.
The great conversation.
Overall, I had a wonderful time at The Main Depot Bar. I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a friendly place to have a drink and a bite to eat in Madison, Wisconsin", 'time': 1697083174, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Pio - Tim Piotrowski', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106841057902209809509/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBH4qzcffVGUviBTKpbFF5rrKrgoQNseTZVorMUGIjcy4Lyf4Z=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Great local bar, owner and bartenders are always friendly, Delta Beer Lab on tap, and the food is good too!', 'time': 1759956846, 'translated': False}]

name: the Cardinal Bar
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Giovanti', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101418408952329119195/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFEfaQF9RcEmsqUlkmq47VRFTBl69tT_CiOrizst9K055AwQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "Went on Saturday night for the latin night, the DJ was great but the bartenders were super rude. I was literally looked at and ignored by the 2 bartenders after waiting at least 5-10 minutes, where I was clearly standing and waiting for service. There were no other standing customers at the bar waiting for service and at least a third of the bar seats were empty. It was not busy during this time. The bar back who initially told me that she was not the bartender when I first arrived to the counter, ended up serving me after the time since I was obviously being ignored. I witnessed her speak to both bartenders on separate occasions, followed by each bartender look directly at me, then proceeded to carry on with other customers and conversations. Felt a little racist if I'm gonna be honest, considering that I am an African American male and that I was clearly looked at, ignored, then proceeded to watch other none AA people get serviced. Not trying to jump to conclusions but that was the vibe. And to add, when I finally ordered 'a Beer' I was told I had to spend a minimum of $10. So couldn't order just one. No one apologized or mentioned anything even after getting my beer. Would not recommend this place unless they hired better service providers....", 'time': 1764137603, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Justin Jones', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108872259906663756193/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-X_B5_aKOSFpVMiM8jfTibvbSYNT6_VPe8Rct-wuGxbxSbSI=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'My friends and I have been for trivia before and it’s such a blast! Great and interesting cocktail menu. Good draft list as well. Seating is sort of limited for trivia but we made it work. Lots of bar space however for whenever you’re just headed there for some fun drinks.', 'time': 1739406703, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tempestt Ballenger', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106254742223268707381/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7bLOOlhq8t7CzvbtnMUbQog6nwKVLa8MqfpvKlNsYjc0XHn4E=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': 'I can’t tell you how happy I am that this place is open again. They truly made my college experience incredible and I enjoyed the time I spent here. I’m so glad they are open again and providing the same great service and cocktails to the Madison community. This place is a Madison staple and is showing folks that things truly get better with age. Glad to see this space is still doing well and is still loved by myself and countless others. Also Will was AMAZING! Please let him know! But Madison folks please give this the place the love and patronage it deserves! You won’t be disappointed 🙌🏾', 'time': 1698524202, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Julie Mitchell', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106189878005944013155/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5SA4kAVDSiTKx6wTBhLNLAZ4xXLq99o_IdD-dqTErXZ7ft68=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Service isn’t just terrible, it’s nonexistent. I went to meet friends as we were celebrating three birthdays, including mine. I also had a visitor from France who was interested in seeing the hot flash nightclub.

In the 20 minutes I stood at the bar, clearly waiting for service, I watched four employees doing shots behind the bar and not paying any attention to who was waiting first. Not once did a single one of them make eye contact with me to let me know they had seen me. I stopped what I assume was a manager (also doing shots) to ask if it was possible to get drinks, and she said she’d send the bartender down. She did not.

My visitor and I left in disgust, walked over to Genna’s, had a drink in hand in under five minutes, and enjoyed the evening air outside.

I am a pleasant customer who always gets served quickly at just about any place. I don’t know why that didn’t happen at the Cardinal, but maybe staff shouldn’t be drinking on the job if they aren’t able to keep up with the flow of customers.', 'time': 1759574297, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Doctress Julia X.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116848294803096133043/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOEVHOSkcECoqKpzVkPO6Dw37Xgk8E5onUrt8rtmvoOgnI_3JZ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Went for a DJ a few weeks back. Good music, really enjoyed that. Inept, apathetic, and rude bartenders. Empty bottles and glasses on every conceivable surface and nobody can go out and bus those, apparently. 2 people standing behind the bar doing nothing (why?), one guy making drinks as fast as he can (not very fast) meanwhile, they are 2 deep at the bar. Embarrassingly bad bar service. Get some real bartenders. Lastly: the bathrooms are dirty and a total free-for-all. There is no place for women to get a moment of privacy or get away from creeps--not sanitary and not safe for women.', 'time': 1765151431, 'translated': False}]
