reviews:
[{'author_name': 'yellowmads', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101339538172722689595/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbEz9skx6CwVT0hd1NsTTwqjQGtWzTPXHbDRV4xdBNAtOnnyU=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'If your not 19 I dont recommend going here anymore. I went on a Tuesday and I got treated like absolute shit and charged more than my friends to go upstairs. When I tried to have a conversation about how I was unhappy they said “thats just the way it is” and said “if you cant afford $10, you shouldn’t come here” and when I asked if they just called me broke they backtracked and made excuses. The bartenders and the bouncers genuinely shocked me with how disrespectful they’ve been. I’m also literally sober and was just trying to have fun with my friends and support a charity. Anyway idk why i am even writing a review they were just so unnecessary rude and arrogant I am literally never going back. (All the girl employees were nice it was just the men that treated me like shit).', 'time': 1761111398, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Collin', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104398641132354325613/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhudVBjsQFzmqYO3V2YcUVlMdC8gwKQx5vdFrGY5hvL5AeqZVm=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': "The fish bowls here are awesome. It's literally a fishbowl filled with whatever beverage (booze) of your choice. Ideally, I would suggest you split it amongst a group of friends.

I came here twice, once for lunch where I got the fishbowl alongside a pretty tasty fried chicken sandwich. A second time later in the evening where it's more of a college bar. Both times I enjoyed my experience. 5 stars!", 'time': 1752589707, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kent Wannebo', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102083452008048641042/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsyaIli_v9pNPs9xfPtpQ5rKPpTo_FWq35z4RrnfPVXuV9FUiYaw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 years ago', 'text': "Life is good, and I'm exactly where I wanna be...but don't you just sometimes miss 1997? I do...so I go to Wando's... I was there when it opened with Panos in the paper (Year of the Roses).

Still serving fishbowls of course, which you can also now buy (minus the alcohol) at the University Book Store downtown off of Lake St and State.

Truly a classy joint now with three floors...no more throwing peanut shells on the floor, or launching unrulies for misbehaving, one helluva guy owns this joint...and I have stories of my days living with the guy on Mifflin, Bassett, and for a time with Chuck in Middleton.

Bacon Night on Tuesday...gotta go when you're feeling thirsty and ignoring the doctor's advice never to binge drink again. But I happened to miss the old man, when I checked in with my wife and daughter recently. The bartender was friendly, as was the cook. Better yet...he made us some delicious lunch!", 'time': 1656592334, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'KC Kurtz', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112062529158957649437/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-sTNOVVR5UntEM2HP32ezxwlAYO1sdexjBEuJCjVA-2YMFA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '8 years ago', 'text': "Classic college bar, but fine place for drinks during the day. Downstairs and upstairs areas. Fine drink prices and specials. Bartender was a little distant despite a small crowd, but the other staff members were friendly. Good place to watch a game. Haven't heard many good things about the night life, but have not had motivation to come back and experience it myself. Overall, it's okay during the day, but I wouldn't stay here too long.", 'time': 1503319724, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Z Zylka', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104672086850889368156/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF09Q0KDykCgDCmPOLNH_f_uuxuDRVT1-QeG8GEBBqHFzmesdE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': 'Service was great!!! Food was solid. Grilled cheese was a ok. Fish bowls are awesome.', 'time': 1702239547, 'translated': False}]
cleaned_reviews: [[{'rating': 4, 'text': 'Service was great!!! Food was solid. Grilled cheese was a ok. Fish bowls are awesome.'}]]

our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews: [{'author_name': 'Ashley Pantel', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110835027887148532377/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5GbGVsOiGO3y4lkJFiMD6XRtGlHtpCosj9ykm4cPUISG7IJ3u=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'My husband and I were in Madison to attend a show at The Orpheum. The Badger game had just ended and we were looking for a place to grab a quick dinner and some drinks prior to the show. After walking a couple blocks we spotted Roxxy and decided to stop in, and we’re extremely glad we did! I loved the vibe with all the music decor hanging throughout! There was a live DJ mixing hits from the 70s through today. I thought the prices were extremely reasonable, especially for being downtown Madison; my husband and I both thought they would’ve been higher. He got the Reuben sandwich and said it was the best he’s ever had. He also upgraded to the sweet potato waffle fries which he said were excellent as well. I ordered the chicken tenders with regular fries which was delicious and the portions were huge! I took my leftovers to-go and had another full meal the next day. The tenders had a light breading that added the perfect crisp to them and the seasoning on the fries was excellent. We were very pleased with the food, drinks, and service! We don’t frequent Madison often but have already talked about making another trip to Roxxy the next time we’re in town!', 'time': 1725842773, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Morgan McCartney', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116741815993797031890/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVVlTSuwlsmtvUTxPbVBc2Zfx2qYjTSQSBHSHSUrgWG94DfZB3=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'We had a great time exploring the new Roxxy just off State, getting a full tour from the amazing owner. The owners and the bartenders were amazing to work with from start to finish, meeting and exceeding every crazy ask I had. They made my night perfect, and all of my family and friends can't stop talking about how wonderful it was.

Very thankful that Ace and Courtney brought a bar of this caliber to Madison!", 'time': 1769279176, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Cheryl Mortvedt', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108514728504355707571/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQaGcQjvthygoBEB8VfE_utkWA1kAdu-NHkCg8BbA4C530kqJPrQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Great relaxing vibe for a glass of wine or cocktail. McC', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117200532819745386317/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItE62z52b3KQGhrIH5O4ojL_dm9XdUvxMGpmR5Ul_m_OjgHcM=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'Great place to grab some after dinner drinks, Xavier is an awesome bartender. I recommend getting the mix drinks that are hand crafted versus the taps.', 'time': 1769963146, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Ricardo Mendez', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112565221430307560279/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVKIPfyemzQIjjnDeuBhHF1BFVV9gmAna8zaABCmvSd5ChM8s=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Nice place to hand out. Tasty cocktails.  Great place to stop by for a drink and tourists.  Nice experience', 'time': 1768257547, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Scott W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102842621857820242708/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUib3WU2k6hVaimUagsfMg_UWC-it2s1h7ZQDZe0SKaS6-KingZgw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba8', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '9 months ago', 'text': 'Nitro is a beverage lounge, and not a "coffee shop".  I found this out when showing up a morning to meets some friends.   These comments are specifically meant to judge it against what I think a coffee shop should be.

It opens at 10:00 (sharp).  I got there earlier, looked inside to see people setting up, and the doors opened, and let in a line of people.  It has a minimal menu of coffees, lattes and teas.  Did not offer a London Fog, so I ordered a Chai Latte.  It was "okay".  A little weak on the tea, and not especially hot.  They don't offer any bakery or pastries (always like me a scone to go with the tea).

There are a bunch of different tables and seating areas.  Unfortunately some of the chairs that they have at the 4-tops, are wire metal, and terribly uncomfortable.  Since there were only 3 of us, we grabbed a small cocktail table, which had 2 cushioned chairs, and an ottoman.

The place was about a 1/3 full, and it was noisy.  The result of the music playing and the hard surfaces.

Perhaps, this beverage lounge is better suited for afternoon or evening gathering.  Just not a great "coffee shop" experience.  Not some place that I would come back too.', 'time': 1746368624, 'translated': False}]

name: Jay's
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Kent Wannebo', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102083452008048641042/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsyaIli_v9pNPs9xfPtpQ5rKPpTo_FWq35z4RrnfPVXuV9FUiYaw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "Everyone has different stories to share about The Red Shed and/or Wando's going back to at least 1994, Year of the 🌹.  Time to make new ones. Bar owner and old college roomie, Jay W bought Red Shed and now has Wando's and Jay's (formerly known as The Red Shed). As par for the course, Wando/Jay has known how to throw a good party since at least 1987 back in the days when we were prowling Johnson, Mifflin, West Wash, and occasionally Bowen Court, looking for people selling red cups.

Obviously we are a long time past the days of gathering to watch Michael Finley tear it up for Wisconsin, and rooting for Mike Tyson to wreak havoc on his opponents early in the first round and being sorry when he did because we just blew our money on PPV. And now The storied Red Shed slides back into the ghosts of bars past along with the likes of Joe Hart's, Madhatters, Bermudas, and R & R Station (among others).

They don't serve food other than popcorn at Jay's at this point 👉...but who cares? If you're that hungry, you just leave and walk half a block to Wando's where you can eat till your heart's content.

The crowd's the same (an eclectic mix of college students and alumni, Badger sports fans of all ages, locals, and also you-- when you get your butt down here. So wipe away your tears-- you're not that old (YET), and come wash the owies away by imbibing upon your spirit of choice with one of the best guys I know. Love you brother.

Warning: Fun times and new memories ahead. Where the hell else do you want to watch a game if you don't have Peacock 🦚? Tennessee got lucky. We'll be ready for them at the Dance, right Coach?

*Also: Wear Red and White. You'll blend in.

**And: Please tip your bartenders...many of them live off booze and 🍜 Ramen like we used to.", 'time': 1699708027, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tara Perre', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109860813719790890175/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT6BaA3KFzSXSclWjQ9m6efPeuBZi2ENCohhkAMIZhmdTVD4k=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Service wasn’t great. reviews:

It was late at night and during spring break, so the restaurant was not as hopping as it would be on most Saturdays. The food and service were great. We tried a number of appetizers and entress. Each was fantastic. Our server was attentive and efficient. I had a Nashville hot chicken sandwich and it was very good. In our party, they tried the BBQ Mac and cheese and burgers. It is definitely worth a visit.', 'time': 1743944738, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Megan Brooks', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117571712361661264288/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPq7YsSII8_mkMVgFRa7jtCkQG08aNSzibt_5Na5Yl-SMJK9A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': 'Went on a Saturday night for dinner and drinks with friends. We got there around 7pm and it was not busy. We were immediately seated in a booth.

The service was excellent. Our server was friendly and quick and was knowledgeable about different types of cocktails.

The atmosphere was okay.  The floors were very sticky in places, which was gross. The ladies room was dirty, and had  a clump of wet dirt and hair between the bathroom stall partition and the wall. The lighting was way too bright in the booth. They turned the lights down a little later in the night.

The food was pretty good and came out quickly. The drinks were very good. I ordered a ranch water with Patron and extra lime, and it was perfect.  The drink specials were great. They had pints of craft beer for $2, which I was not expecting.  They also had a wide selection of beers on tap.

I had a good time. The drinks and the service were great. Not sure if I will go back though.', 'time': 1693243645, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chadwick Domack', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107862477594070670023/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXt6m9ttY9zGaFwNiaXkxRlfu5AWbzZyxvuW6FNk9lKx9xxH188Mg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 years ago', 'text': "New location is an absolute upgrade. There did seem to be a lack of easily accessible outlets, so bring your stuff charged!

The iced vanilla latte w oat milks and croissant themselves were at par with what you’d expect at a boutique coffee shop. Extra points for the “for here” glass though, definitely beats a plastic cup any day.

Oh, and it’s at the foot of the capitol building and has the lake pretty much in its backyard… can’t beat the location.', 'time': 1759944265, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Madeleine (The Ruiner)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108192577881248340796/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJONtJaRuCm7uXeXt8MVzgHNzPh86-B3uEJq80CNqwJjdezhVk=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'At noon on Saturday, what a scene,
The busiest café I’ve ever seen.
Ten minutes to order, four folks ahead,
By the time I reached the till, I felt misled.

The cashier was kind but clearly stressed,
Our cappuccino chat was not their best.
Fifteen more minutes, they called my name—
A latte appeared, not the drink I’d claim.

She offered a fix with a weary face,
But the line was long, I gave her grace.
The team worked hard, they gave their all,
But the system’s cracks began to fall.

The coffee? Fine, just not worth the fuss,
Mediocre sips don’t win my trust.
Next time I’ll wander, find someplace new,

The crepes were delicious, particularly the lemon curd crêpe. The coffee was delicious with beautiful latte art. The house made vanilla syrup was a highlight. We will definitely be back.', 'time': 1765558315, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Scott W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102842621857820242708/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUib3WU2k6hVaimUagsfMg_UWC-it2s1h7ZQDZe0SKaS6-KingZgw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba8', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "First time here. We were visiting Madison and walking around the downtown area. It's a small space (almost tiny) that sits at a narrow intersection, so it's literally a pie-shaped space. The upside is that there are lots of windows with natural light.

The inside seating consists of long tables or counters along the windows. This is not a place where you are likely to hunker down for a quiet or private conversation. You can tell that storage space is at a premium, with boxes stashed in overhead areas or equipment in the bathrooms.

The staff there were very pleasant and helpful.  Ended up getting a Chai Latte (extra foam) in a mug. It didn’t take long to make, and they delivered it out to the table. It was an excellent drink — hot, flavorful, extra foam, and not too sweet. A joy to drink.

The atmosphere is a bit manic. With the tight seating, you can feel a bit claustrophobic, or on the other hand, like you are at a concert and getting energy from the crowd.

For me, it's a place to grab a drink and find a quiet space elsewhere. So not likely a place that I would return to.", 'time': 1759800291, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Marissa Gehrke', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114399247079063544886/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIbduYljVWmQarb2BwFm3eyl-szolhmEapDi2uuwLK7IAe4A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Bradbury’s is one of my favorite coffee shops in Madison. name: Colectivo Coffee State St.
reviews: [{'author_name': 'Mad City Patron', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115503909546983236796/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2WW3s-bsNgd50u1D5UprKz_ooBRlRR70imomvQER3DdfThE8=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': "A smooth cafe experience. Many people don't realize these cafes are not hiring professionally trained customer service experts. If you have a diet or other issue, or need something resolved, you have to ask questions, ask for a supervisor, and ask for what you want. You must give staff a chance to fix the mistake, instead of expecting them to know how to flawlessly fix your problem without asking. This is a local cafe chain, not L'toile. I ordered the soothe sayer tea, avocado toast, and blueberry muffin. It was all fresh. Lots of avo spread across the toast, which had the right consistency. I asked for the muffin to be warmed up. It was warm, fluffy - lots of berries. The cafe is two floors. Lots of seating and sunlight. Music on the sound system was fine. Tables/chairs are wood. name: Broken Board Coffee
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'melanie tornoe', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117653893234083716177/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1axFsU3B0aGJVJZeIxgThYbhaBgTCHEIUR3ksE4qZ27yyv8Bk=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'What an absolute gem! This shop perfectly combines the thrill of boardsports with the comfort of great coffee. I stopped in for a quick break and ordered the sweet potato latte, and wow, it completely blew me away. The flavor was rich, earthy, and perfectly balanced, with a freshness you can taste in every sip. The barista’s latte art was a beautiful touch that made the experience feel extra special.

On top of that, the atmosphere is so cool, a mix of snowboard and skateboard culture that feels welcoming and inspiring. Whether you’re into boards or just hunting down amazing coffee, this place delivers on both fronts.

I’ll absolutely be stopping here every time I travel this route. Highly recommend checking them out if you want top-tier gear AND coffee that rivals the best cafés.', 'time': 1759259980, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jen T', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112944412946650055921/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6StfMmQjE6NLOM65MAAUWbjfkYsYXpxFWtSjvKz-2bA5ygic=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': "Broken Board Coffee has my heart. Jared is the best, I call him a flavor potion-ist because he concocts some of the most unique, divine seasonal specials (Thai Me Up, Hide Tide, and Sweeet Potato are a few favs). House-made syrups. Quality ingredients. Local bakery treats. Lovely humans work here. It's a fun space to pop in or hangout for awhile. Fun design & branding & merch.. stickers, pins, two of my favorite t-shirts are from Broken Board. This place is truly a gem in Madison.", 'time': 1769971777, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kelly Scott', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102381433439704816441/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0_fp6DPwkOagEvftDwww3lAxkfxFfh9Ng4XYseweFBcwMaRTS9Q=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Are you kidding me? A coffee shop inside a board shop. Ahh yes plz! Such a novel idea. The coffee is seriously fantastic! Seriously. Sweet potato latte was so damn good.', 'time': 1767295600, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Sarah Reynolds', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117906083215488148123/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjIQLOmfH6D05nJrMlZjUBrgQ9e7aZBzX2SYgO-ffZ25JH8wUY1g=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'A skateboard store and coffee shop in one. I ordered a pour over coffee and browsed around while it was being prepared, there are various board merchandise for sale and the boards come in a lot of cool designs (availability may vary from time to time). The drink came out faster than expected, I am usually prepared to wait a long time for pour overs. I forgot the name of the exact pour over flavor but I chose one of 3 randomly and really liked it. Friendly service 🛹', 'time': 1756933154, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Steve Johnson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106092676328813824752/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUo91IjS2pRcSn2aK1tq1epXv9TNzNMj0dfIY6uLYe1JKpE4q6s=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Great coffee in a fun location. name: Bloom Bake Shop
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Linda Franzen', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113642201093506358089/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRSazBkjsh77F5DqoiIwDBzumfNmmlFnU_sneQBZwY_Becag=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "Outstanding bakery in Madison with great bread, pastries and sandwiches. Everything I've tried has been amazing! Highly recommend a visit. Some of their pastries can also be found at local coffee shops (Alice Good).", 'time': 1768672198, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Have been coming to Bloom for several years ever since they had the original location in Middleton . After opening up their East Madison location I go to that one more often .

I was in the Monroe neighborhood and could not resist to stop in to the mothership location.

Cases were packed with amazing savory and sweet items as always . They also make sandwiches to go if you put your order in .

There was a line of people waiting to get in which is normal . It is worth the wait - trust me !

Gluten free case to the left of the register is full of bakery items , cupcakes and scones . A good gf selection to choose from .

For a savory I tried their pesto pinwheel which is an interesting take of a pesto filled roll extra fluffy and pull apart . For a sweet I could get everything they make but I did go with the classic cinnamon roll. Similar fluffy airy as the pesto pinwheel with a great balance of cinnamon sugar and frosting .

I don’t frequently go to Monroe neighborhood as it can be hard to find street parking , however whenever I find myself in that part of town I will always stop in to Bloom for a special treat .', 'time': 1756567472, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Brittany', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111912947226134931078/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8YQe1Bb3NM03vJ19JyjQWW4aPhSWGWLaBsEksPMimFHjz8A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Lovely little bakery! They’ve got quite the daily selection of baked goods and glad that I was in town early as it opened as there was a line started before they even opened today! I grabbed a box full of goodies and they were delicious!

There is also a vegan/gluten free section in its own case.', 'time': 1766524627, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Keri Ferguson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102666966762844924517/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKT54eedJKvMNmI7s1DCUot1KNvcJpQk93hacI6rX9k3lOWsje=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Any of the Croissants! The layers are straight outta Paris! Our Favorite is the plain... so simple yet unique: soft airy, delicate, buttery innards with a tan, crunchy outter layer. Peeled apart, each section is good, but together, is wholesome yummy. The morning bun is just a Croissant with honey (slightly sweet, not American-ized). No one flavor overpowers another.

And vegan options: donuts, cookies, specialty cake (sometimes an extra one for walk-ins). Also, bread. Oh! And dog treats!', 'time': 1757603884, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'W Wk', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111380119768113029098/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfQNcIxTWyexy_SMHDnVGd1oA-f5WXPgALTLfzey5hpQXOFtiDww=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "One could say good things about Bloom Bake Shop.
Unfortunately, I cannot.
I can only say FANTASTIC and ABSOLUTELY WONDERFULLY GREAT things.
From standard baking to vegan and gluten free, Bloom provides the best. In my opinion.
You will just have to go, buy a sampling and then judge for yourself. If you're not impressed, we'll then it's on you.", 'time': 1758645955, 'translated': False}]

name: The Marquette Cafe
our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Barbara Gulten', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100511303922034423711/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_GvCD6E5T9HcViTxOX5vZftm0vslp6usz9eXjcrW_pT_pABc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '9 months ago', 'text': 'Charming small neighborhood cafe with freshly made food. And might be making the best matcha latte in town! No joke - it was the best one I had in a while. Service is lovely, you order at the counter but they are helpful and bus the tables afterwards. They are also thoughtful and ask about specifics to get your order right. We had a lovely delicious brunch. The place was busy, clean, and pleasant. Menu has some vegan options and they can accommodate gluten free. Portions are very decent. What we ordered came with two sides, more than what we expected. They had some big windows open to let fresh air in.

Parking can be tricky, it’s all street parking in that area. So you may have to parks some place near and walk. Highly recommend it - turns out this nook it’s better than other places that have bigger names.', 'time': 1747504589, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'danna guzman', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105282263213907681811/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJGK_C1UiNUm7BY9OxI7priJNzSYvJixWeX0n-kPbVUbkn0LE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Probably my favorite cafe in Madison!! nice and quiet ambiance, pleasant decor, very tasty food, beverages don’t have that rich of a flavor but still good. In the summer all the giant windows are open so they allow dogs inside and even have treats! There is a cute little patio in the back as well!', 'time': 1722005049, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Maimoua', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112859603594659803216/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYWVW6DxBQfOhbPi2R-xNa2iW1xUPiQSnI1nT6Tp9W37gf1nQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 years ago', 'text': 'Overall, a decent menu with reasonable prices. I deducted 2 stars for a couple of reasons. We placed an ordered for pick up scheduled for 9:45AM. The food wasn’t ready until 10:15AM which was disappointing. During the waiting period, 3 employees asked if we had been helped, but that’s as far as help went. The food was also warm - for having to wait 30 min, this shouldn’t have been the case at all. Lastly, I ordered a veggie eggs benedict and the poached eggs were way overcooked with VERY little hollandaise sauce if any at all.

I suppose you get what you pay for. I recommend going elsewhere for breakfast as there are certainly better restaurant options in the neighborhood.', 'time': 1673216141, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Lauren Meidl', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115196545029524685190/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmrtuWGEFiIwYKa1s0NLsMOdpmQ1cooSBG4nop_iyItl0ZWtfq=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': "We had the loveliest time at The Marquette this morning! The staff were all so kind and welcoming to my dog! Thank you & can't wait to be back soon.", 'time': 1718302365, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Georgie Nazos', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107136605250476870164/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXO5K7mWh7aqzw0SBx0FUSdVLAiPQKliY3rFSq-Yms4tAM5w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "First time here and was really impressed. name: MOKA
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Patrick Dunlop', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100915186593230566215/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoYhyAVzF-UqdHIU6-WDpp7w-KYeWP_1E7QjtcPWUUA2PLwqrL=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "The wife loves a latte, and this place present and pleasant atmosphere, no wait and easy to access. She was a fan! Both indoor and outdoor seating space, free Wi-Fi and decently priced coffee! All adds up to the perfect place whether you're looking for a quick stop or a place to sit down, this place is quick.", 'time': 1759175674, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'google reviewer', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105935781026895452478/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUu1R4mX7ysCbEbXFsdn2kGBsYYama2f_7DkS5BT0wxsMIyg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Moka is, without a doubt, the most amazing place on Earth. I always make a point to come back to Madison just for it. Every single time, the experience is flawless.
The employees are incredible—friendly, efficient, and fast. No matter how busy it gets, they always make you feel welcome and ensure your drink is perfect. And speaking of drinks, mine always tastes amazing. Consistently, without fail.
The breakfast burritos are another reason I keep coming back—they’re delicious, filling, and never disappoint. Honestly, in three years of visiting, I’ve never had a bad experience.
Moka isn’t just a coffee shop; it’s a reliable, joyful, top-tier experience. If you love coffee, great food, and outstanding service, this is hands down the best coffee shop ever.- Love your consistent and awesome customer Erik', 'time': 1767672910, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Bani', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109421441835015567079/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3qkSaJ4CjJkzRUh-w52nBAerxoP8jg-WWDf8wp5AIi0XxdI18=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "love this place always nice for a quick coffee pit stop but personally i LOVE the oreo shake, it's been my favorite for so many years and i will continue to get it", 'time': 1767309756, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Angela Barian', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102894415760956007705/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzTZy2XioMvS9o4FZA-Ijb-GckA5UyJxic-WQbpbGGBEWTq8ex=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "The people that work at this location deserve five stars at least — they're really quick, pleasant, and they make consistent drinks! I took a star off for corporate policy because *come on guys* —\xa0it's 2023 and I can't add a tip to my credit card purchase? Every other coffee shop manages to do this. Makes me worry all the good people will quit. GET WITH IT, MOKA.", 'time': 1681098198, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Ashley Lesko', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100104521751561817799/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbZjOH6zQOvIvX0efDZGHbYz43w8xTRt2YOgK664i1wPGnBGTwUw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'genuinely the best iced black and white mocha i’ve ever had. i’ve never heard of it prior to ordering it here for the first time a couple of years ago and have tried ordering it at other coffee shops when im out of town but they never come close (and i end up ordering just a vanilla latte instead…) i don’t know what makes the black and white mocha so good but whatever it is keeps bringing me back so thank u moka', 'time': 1717734574, 'translated': False}]

It was clean, well lit, but not too bright, not very packed, but I prefer it that way and the last Chicago Bears game was playing on multiple large screens. Great vibe! The next time I'm in Madison, I'm definitely stopping through here.", 'time': 1769384831, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Christina Gifford', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112060573260317428367/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_Dsgns5ajh-A3t9dpKy7RHMrzsryFtaOs1fsLm_10wF-bHW6j=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Wings & Things might just be the best decision we made on our trip to Madison (sorry to the museums and lakes). In addition, the service was top-notch!

I tried the mango habanero, hot honey, and honey BBQ dry rub, and each one made me question my life choices up to that moment. On our last day, they even let me order the wings with waffles, and omg I was so happy.

My partner (a devoted carnivore) admitted the veggie wings were awesome, though of course he still swears by the meat ones. Either way, this place is a win for everyone. I normally give service workers the benefit of the doubt—they’re often overworked and underpaid—but this individual has been consistently rude in past visits and has also gotten my orders wrong before due to what seems like a lack of care.

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Jake Dubs', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101104630318957968524/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTLQfZq1ebBYe3AJdI2p44EtM3giopFRs801Vn8V76jhapk0L0=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "I ordered a 5 pack of frozen beef with the works last night. I ordered around 10pm before the college kids. I received a pack of basically 3-4 potato ones and no sour cream or cilantro. I don't mind if they could tell me if they were out of cilantro/sour cream if that's what happened, but I paid $37 dollars for my order and was left extremely upset. I cooked the potato ones for my vegetarian roommate, but I just want my money back or comp.", 'time': 1768773477, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Essi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116329353730642684278/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXRzcv3wnXpg-yKa8duXEfdWFVQAlOmCf2Z9PWC2yGh85e1nA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'The potato dumplings were ok, but a little bland in our taste (they lacked some seasoning). But reasonable pricing!

The service felt a bit unwelcoming due to the lack of a simple greeting upon entry, even though we were the only customers at the moment. Service in the counter could be more friendly.', 'time': 1762797888, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Manar Daghash', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117431014222422621231/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrwyVOSJI6Dbf-jANWpK9a1CoMl0tt1L6BHk31nxYt2yVHkI_G=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'We absolutely had to put this iconic Pel’meni spot on out Madison itinerary and were not let down. I can understand why this place is so legendary- especially in the middle of a university town. We ordered a mix (both potato and ground beef dumplings with the works- which includes butter, cilantro, yellow curry, chili sauce, and sour cream. Once you start eating them its very difficult to stop. If you’re debating, just get the full order not the half. Trust a sister. For the price and the value for the taste, I would easily give these Russian dumplings a 4/5!', 'time': 1735970867, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chrono', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111233025200011953303/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4m0ELLgK4cPFG0wLPxcIp8u3QeS4HcZI1GrkkclcwxXFmag=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Paul’s Pierogi is an absolute gem — the kind of place that makes you fall in love with Polish comfort food all over again. Every pierogi is handmade with care, perfectly doughy on the outside and generously filled with flavorful, well-seasoned ingredients. Whether you go for the classic potato and cheese, the savory meat, or the sweet fruit varieties, each bite tastes like pure comfort.

The freshness is undeniable — nothing tastes mass-produced here. The onions are caramelized just right, the butter rich and aromatic, and the textures perfectly balanced. It’s clear Paul’s takes pride in doing things the traditional way.

The service is friendly and down-to-earth, with the staff always ready to offer a recommendation or a warm smile. The prices are fair, especially considering the quality and portion sizes.

In short, Paul’s Pierogi is five-star all the way — authentic, delicious, and made with heart. It’s the kind of spot you’ll crave again the moment you leave.', 'time': 1762241311, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chad Young', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105992315217125707566/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEw9pVo4tXnrd_moWt8poC-Ujf-cKqxPe2JQnQNTEpe5zOxIG_=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Do not miss the best Madison late night munchies you could ever finish a part night with!! reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Anthony Ladd', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115532915074448563501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIClyDtZH8lNGI-FNdVKQHoRdtruY9AjuPZacr395Gu9vvxcQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'Walked over after visiting MMOCA for dinner. No waiting and order cordially taken.  Promptly served entrees. The food quality was very pleasing and appropriately portioned. Both entrees tasted very good and fresh ingredients were used. First time visiting but would return.', 'time': 1750028641, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'J W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110504234299419039706/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2nmenvt4XYisncxQ106tgFMlZ0jLPFzccaADj8qNBntMDNIFF=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': "While staying in the area, we stopped here to get a meal for our grandson, and it was a disappointing experience from start to finish. It began at the register; the staff member was unable to answer basic questions about the ingredients in the Steak Stroganoff, which was concerning and set a poor tone.

After paying, I waited for over 20 minutes. Despite being the only customer waiting in the restaurant, no one spoke to me or called my name. When I finally asked a kitchen worker to check on the status, he told me the food was already ready. I had been standing in the same spot where I ordered, and he bluntly informed me that orders are picked up on the other side of the front area—something no one had shared with me.

By the time I got the food, both my meal and my grandson's were lukewarm and soggy from sitting in condensation. The staff was neither knowledgeable nor friendly, and the lack of communication was unacceptable. I will not be patronizing this location again.

Tip for others: If you are new to this location, be aware that the staff may not notify you when your food is ready. Make sure to check the far side of the counter yourself, or your food will sit there getting cold.", 'time': 1769540071, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Roy Melakayil', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102253420140847500418/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIs2WlnXnTeK5Uu1kcp6XYZ02DdyeFRaUsDphWB5rbJcKlB87Tr=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'Food was okay at best. My issue was during checkout. The employee, before I could even address the tap to pay, decided to push the tip button himself saying, "oh this is how you get past that screen to pay." He pushed the button to tip on his own and acted like it was the norm.

I won't be back.', 'time': 1753224592, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Zachary Kabara', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111278559221272792184/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkWdEojQDJ-Agn8DBzr73z0u9d7eT7ZeWW8p-QKMkNIbFRW6kLoA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'very nice staff, fun college atmosphere. the staff have to deal with a lot here as state street gets some characters, but the handle it well. very nice to hear the staff enjoy being around each other.', 'time': 1767211328, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Dante Schrantz', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100759941773208717659/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcwA21y7rBAxlzzc97RRDaZUzHqJJuZm3SkJ4IZbIl7wpGPQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'The location is fairly rundown and it shows with the decoration and the state of the tables, chairs and carpeting. our_area: ['downtown madison, wisconsin', 'westside madison, wisconsin', 'eastside madison, wisconsin']
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Chris', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102740663824413019939/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIRfuDS0uklcr7acac64rFIoARxNgDXXRykqJ_XtcnxKfNqgIq=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I was led here by a coupon for a free gyro and I hope in every timeline I find that coupon. The aesthetics were spectacular. I was greeted by a warm employee and a Greek statue, pictured below. There was an optional (hidden) virtual tour, and an upstairs roof garden that stunned me. The walls were clad in Greek memorobilia, and I felt at home in some steamy Aegen beach. The food was fantastic, certainly worth the price. For a restaurant within a "Raising Cane's" or "Healthy Fastfood" priceline, or even a somewhat upscale diner, "Parthenon Gyros" excels.', 'time': 1760564662, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Sameer Khan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104271517097365110704/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_hQjFFMF8PxnnaoX-vssQAgBIx1vR6vlabc0O7mJFtZpa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Was craving gyros and saw this place was close by, thought I’d give it a try. I got the “freaky greek” sandwich, which was pitched to me as 6oz of gyro meat (compared to the regular gyro sandwich which had 4oz) as well as 2 chicken skewers on top (which the “mega” gyro sandwich doesn’t have). Sweet. $19 total.

The vibe itself is pretty cool. The workers are friendly and the place is clean. The patio seating upstairs is beautiful and is great for people watching on the street. There’s a street level patio too, but I highly recommend you sit upstairs… much nicer and secluded.

The sandwich itself was SUPER mid. Probably Sysco or other large food distributor. The gyro meat didn’t really have the consistency or thickness of gyro meat… it was more like the shredded flank you’d find in a Philly cheesesteak? Idk, was just super dry. The chicken skewers were a bit juicier but again, probably from the back of a freezer truck.

All in all, it’s a decent med spot by campus with good vibes. $19 definitely got a lot of sandwich, which I was content with, but I’d personally rather pay almost $20 for a sandwich, fries, and a drink like at other places…. Allows for a change of flavor as eventually the dryness of the sandwich gets old here.

Glad I tried it, would recommend if someone’s in the area and down bad for some Mediterranean food. name: Osteria Novella
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Daniela Lehmkuhl', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115361608195305314092/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlSt3I_1Y8f9Bpj2BpXb8IYrK6fDdl0SYnCBipea7ok9UZ7j_N=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'We had such a wonderful experience at Osteria Novella! We grabbed seats at the bar and started the evening with several beautiful craft cocktails….each one perfectly balanced and thoughtfully made.

To start, we had the sourdough topped with buffalo mozzarella, Piennolo tomatoes, and prosciutto… absolutely incredible. Fresh, flavorful, and the perfect way to kick off the meal.

For our mains, we shared a scallop dish that was cooked to perfection and a gluten-free pasta with porcini mushrooms that was rich, earthy, and deeply satisfying. Every bite of both dishes was divine.

The new build-out is stunning….warm, stylish, and inviting without feeling overdone. And the service? Truly impeccable. Attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely welcoming.

Highly, highly recommend Osteria Novella. We’ll definitely be back! 🍸🍝✨', 'time': 1770408473, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Steps', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101570056678917263834/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwhhuDROyA2oRskkyvFLdHPjylA62LEalcltcJXd3Hv7Xhmw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': 'I cannot say enough great things about this place! I will give you one piece of advice, TRY IT! It is by far the best Italian restaurant in Madison. The food, atmosphere, and service were impeccable.', 'time': 1769564630, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Madeleine Zeller', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114023723047333575757/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV465QcaDYEB1ZlaE0u984gZX2IrZIFSWt0Qt-Q7V3ypoOs2YDZ6g=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'My husband and I tried Osteria Novella for the first time last Friday and, while we had heard very good things already, it still exceeded our expectations. We had to reserve a table almost a month in advance and I can now see why. Service is impeccable, food is out of this world, and the ambience is romantic and cozy. We had trouble choosing from the long list of antipasti (appetizers) but went with the crostone, which was unbelievably good - perfectly toasted bread with basil aioli, burrata, mortadella, sun-dried tomatoes, hot honey, arugula, and pistachios. My husband got the pappardelle as an entree and I got the social, a beautifully soft and pillowy gnocchi with a tomato sauce that included both sun-dried tomatoes and cherry tomatoes apparently grown in volcanic Italian soil, as well as lots of garlic and burrata. We had to take leftovers because we wanted to save room for dessert - the budino, which was incredibly smooth and had a layer of caramel as well as the whipped cream and chocolate. Last but not least, the cocktails were great particularly the Villa Salvia, which had an amazing texture due to the EVOO washed State Line gin. All in all we had a fabulous evening and will definitely be back!', 'time': 1770570582, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chris Wang', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117183007132034077688/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKAFL82qvwS8_YpF62Ln92QN-XbXI9FH1_nJH7S4RT81s1RCHR=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'All the food was really good and the service was amazing as well. Best Italian restaurant in Madison so far - hope they can keep it up!', 'time': 1767539890, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Nicola Porto', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109698025699246435948/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSlRcmosWJxrPVzOL3o4QuQXSw8RhIO3b2EQUQlWgd6TXWcGgj=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'A stunning, thoughtful Italian restaurant on the west side of Madison! name: PIKKITO Madison
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Tommy Lee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102388054101039351392/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSNZb2c-kASTmQKNKNAx4RlODIOTuM7H_2Qvb9e_O0149yIw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'PIKKITO is a fantastic spot for anyone looking to enjoy great local Peruvian cuisine in Madison. The flavors are bold, fresh, and incredibly satisfying — everything tastes thoughtfully prepared and authentic.

It’s also a perfect place for groups. The family-style meals make ordering easy, fun, and ideal for sharing, whether you’re out with friends, family, or coworkers. Portions are generous and meant to be enjoyed together, which really adds to the experience.

If you’re looking for something a little different from the usual and want a place that delivers both quality food and a great group dining option, PIKKITO is absolutely worth checking out. Highly recommend!', 'time': 1768421791, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mimi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105542969490155756911/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdilJ_IMarOkANgr9RWCKChXS0r1-xgUnghEuZjiPHgw6jQH8p=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'I went here with a group of co-workers and we all had a really good time! The food overall was yummy and the service was great, super friendly and quick. I ordered the Lomo Saltado and liked the flavor a lot, but the rice felt undercooked (kind of chalky and crunchy in the middle), which wasn’t fun to eat. The beef was also way overcooked and super chewy, like really well done.

I’m not sure if that’s normal for Peruvian food, but it threw me off a bit since the rest of the dish was tasty. On the bright side, I also got the flan and it was really good! name: Kettle Black Kitchen
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Neal Silbert', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114314484028091909380/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXSjcGAnS_58Yny2rR1YCoLxJC1S9vb2GAmmqZZxN_QyvK0g=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'Overall a very nice Monroe street restaurant, demonstrating the variety and creativity of the restaurant scene in madison, WI.
If you’re Lucy you can find street parking in Monroe street, otherwise you’ll need to park on a side street a bit away.
The food is very good through 2 or 5 dishes had too much salt in them - the Salmon is a constant staple and very good on their daily rotating menu, but the rice was too salty - which was a shame.
Service was excellent.
The carrot cake is made at Kettle Black and very good. A close rival to the carrot cakes from Madison Sour Dough who sets the high bar.
Dishes are generally shared plates and tasty. The duck looked very good but after ordering we were too full.
The meal came to about $50 per person and seemed a fair value.
Kettle Black seems like the kind of restaurant you can visit without getting tired of the menu. If they can get the salt under control on the salmon and the olive toast it’ll get 5 stars from me.
Of note, the chocolate dessert - a dense delicious pudding was really good and worth trying.', 'time': 1771081712, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Michael Stricklin', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106657756215196823279/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWjGXUO-17x-ACXoyJuhPJNIRKqRL6PlbA6J0tlLyhYmCmeA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'The fact that the menu changes is so awesome. Getting to experience the food while on my visit to Madison was wonderful. The salmon tasted amazing, the carrots were so good with local ingredients. The butternut squash pasta was sooo good. The flavors were all so unique to their plate but also wen together well. Thank you for the experience.', 'time': 1763787975, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Bryon Schmitz', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110992243209237932837/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDwl8puL1ikPGEr5GE9KgzUgii9cmT-Do6x7M2qa6GyEQkc0p3=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': 'We had early dinner reservations at 4:30. First customers there on a beautiful day outside. Ordered a couple of cocktails along with two shared items, biscuits and venison. Both were absolutely must haves. Don’t see Venison much on menus. Perfectly good. Great flavor.

Onto dinner. The salmon was just the right spice or heat. Our waitress informed us about the heat on it. We both thought it was just right. Not over the top. The pappardelle noodles were cooked perfectly. The flavor was soooo good. Excellent dish. Both were right up our alley.

The dessert was carrot cake and it was not super dense. It was light and delicious. Coconut. No raisins. I like raisins but my wife doesn’t. Happy middle ground. I don’t mind. Cake was perfect.

Great service and very attentive. Thank you', 'time': 1744077323, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Randy J', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105115021766540702697/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUBdVfyWCEbUAg2OHBLPxJQntaFPNvOURf0XB_WmwMBaYk66Lldg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '12 months ago', 'text': 'Tried for first time for wife’s birthday dinner. Knocked it out of the park. Cocktails were delicious. Cheddar biscuits are legendary and a must have. Street corn so good. We had the Potato & Cheese Soup with Fried Chicken and the Duck Pot Pie. Both outstanding and savory. The fried chicken was a small breaded ball on top of the soup, would have been nice for a little more of that, but the soup itself is orgasmic! The carrot cake birthday surprise was a nice finish.', 'time': 1740411365, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kirk Rader', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111009610340139169975/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVys9CiwymT5y7-TkuIEC3a47C324GamgUlIDzWWUsGOpy1eGBE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'One of the best meals I’ve had since moving to Madison a few years ago. Innovative takes on classic dishes and preparations that are unique but still true to their origins. The duck breast al pastor, for example, could compete with the trendiest restaurants in Oaxaca. (My only nit to pick with that dish was that I would have preferred a higher ratio of chipotle salsa to cotija crema.) My husband raved about the seafood he ordered, which he said combined excellent Italian flavors with a preparation that reminded him of Taiwanese soup dumplings. Both entrees paired well with the street corn side dish, which was hands-down the best esquites I’ve yet found in the Midwest.', 'time': 1767270971, 'translated': False}]

name: Ama Kitchen
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Guy Lofts', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106888774085901621325/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe1N5jmeDSqXR-XGUlTGw3KKrOxC50AB1SR3NOob4xOMYQXZiHuw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'What a pleasant surprise.   From the moment we stepped inside we lived the experience.   We received a warm welcome in a very nice spacious and well designed space with original Nepalese artwork.
The spicy beef starter was likely the best I have had in years. And all 3 mail courses,  lamb chop, lamb stew and curry were exceptional. All flavors were created by some one who really knows their food and could easily be a Michelin star.   Only for a fraction of the price.    Thank you and we will make this place our go to whenever in Madison

Such a good experience.', 'time': 1757297138, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Caleb Hudson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105593633844850864388/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkzJH1PkxQNoKnyRrMp7KL1Iordwcs3bOIHJZRzqn3A9s5ZQBJRA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'We checked out Ama Kitchen after some friends hyped it up, and it did not disappoint. Our server, Logan, was super friendly and even pointed out a few menu items we probably would’ve missed. Everything he suggested was great, but the kabobs? Absolutely amazing. Definitely recommend!', 'time': 1754692033, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Rachel Menon', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113919419506519691613/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK8-fq0CMaxsS2Xxc2vcmMsNFCuoM3CEwiR2J6SHbx_jStsvR8bw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '11 months ago', 'text': "We had an excellent Sunday brunch at Ama. The service was extremely attentive and friendly. We ordered the dosa available at that time of day on the menu, but we were hoping for just plain dosa with some chutney. We'd like to try the dinner menu in the future. We also prefer more spice, but understand that's not always a preference for all patrons. I'd love to see more spicy options! The building was beautifully decorated and we loved the atmosphere. If we lived in the area, we would definitely frequent this place!", 'time': 1742626350, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Daniel Fogel', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116431745621029673792/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVs2zq7DbBKEPHJhGg-aTPNbgtlPQF1LWczJmXY1hSv7NalQ8PtUQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'My only complaint is that I didn’t go to Ama sooner. The restaurant is beautifully decorated. You are greeted by the bar as you walk in and there are tables on the main level and upstairs. We sat upstairs (think Lazy Jane’s but quieter and more intimate). The service was excellent including wonderful suggestions to try the masala chicken which was tender (reminiscent of the curry chicken at Sala Thai) and the sauce was bursting with flavor. The samosas were crispy with delightful vegetarian insides. The chicken dumplings were also incredible. I was there for my birthday and they surprised me the house carrot cake for dessert. Lots of subtle flavor and a dark cherry sauce of the plate. Can’t wait to return', 'time': 1770389966, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Adam Rieder', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106096897938222488476/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPbNYcr_l-pBTJ_cyDIcA8rCrJqYsqqyvNTdvwCsPDeO1UWS_9gA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "We had a great time at Ama!

We tried two appetizers (all 3 types of momos they had that night + haku chwela), all of which were amazing.

My partner ordered the lamb kebab, and I got the chicken tikka dish. His lamb was perfectly cooked, and my chicken was fall-apart tender. The sauces and veggies on the plates were delicious and fresh.

For dessert, we split a slice of carrot cake, but the almond cake they had on the menu sounded really good (unfortunately they were out).

The decor inside is modern and up market; it's physically a very nice space.

I've been longing for higher end dining options from India/Pakistan/Nepal in town, and I'm very excited to see a place like this establish itself!

It's a little recessed from the road which makes it sort of hard to find. That is the only criticism I can muster.", 'time': 1767989239, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Gino Ricchio', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105806095352205337277/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdF9jXJy7Pi6_e3SOM7t3RpIUfrvxxD0rKbRIsII1TiC1uvrDo=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'The spicy chicken tenders were delicious! Really large and juicy and tons of food with fries. We got a side of curds and that was plenty for 2 people. The homemade sauces are delicious. I want to take a bottle of the green goddess mayo home! Super cute decor! We will definitely be back!', 'time': 1770766756, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Andy & Deb Slawek', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102418385835595037617/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIT7yI2HlON4j3TEHPJOO4E4dlakEax0ms27O6QyrMoYBacSg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'So I was told butterbitd was too expensive, but folks are wrong!

Went there with my wife on a Sunday and it was fairly busy at 1pm. I love that you are met right away by someone to take your order and explain the menu.

While driving to Butterbird, my wife already recited the menu and we decided to split the three chicken fingers plate with a side of fries. An Awesome choice!

We were given a number to place  on our table to receive our food, and it came out quickly.

But first, the atmosphere here is tremendous done in wood, with the bar in the middle of the whole building. But what was great is the tremendous  amount of booths that can seat six people or elevated table tops. The lighting was perfect, the temperature inside was perfect for the 13 degree weather and the place was very clean.

The food arrived quickly and I was in shock. Two of the chicken fingers looked like a quarter of a thigh! They were huge, well breaded but the big surprise was… the chicken melted in your mouth… literally! It was some of the best moist chicken I have ever eaten!

The fires were cut like McDonalds fries, but just seemed to lack something, like a seasoning or more salt. If anything, I think Butterbird should offer 3 different seasonings to put on the fries to jazz it up. All the food was hot.

I am glad my wife got the dill ranch to dip her chicken (and fries) because it was fantastic. I got the regular BBQ  sauce, but it really lacked any flavor. I think if they made it a smoky flavor bbq it would be great, but it was only just “ok”.

This is one place I WILL be recommending to friends. An awesome meal, great atmosphere makes it perfect Regent St place to go eat.

Oh yeah and the price? It was justified by the huge portions, great taste and atmosphere!

I am one of the top 7% Google reviewers and have had my photographs reviewed over 2.3 million times. But most of all, I love food!', 'time': 1766536039, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Heather Li', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108382391261837993357/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfTTPcXfeNxzuLsJs8aAjZjtPQtECWS59v_ppUos080XJFqEh-fw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Butterbird is fabulous addition to Regent Street. This would be THEE place to watch a Packers or Badgers game. The counter is throwing out an accurate 1940s/1950s vibe. I've never seen anything quite like it before. I like that you order and pay at the counter so you can leave whenever you want without having to flag down a server to pay your bill. The outdoor patio is very open and airy. The service was fantastic and obviously the chicken is great. I had the Butterbird Classic. It was delicious. My only suggestion is maybe a different sauce - it comes with a "Dilly Ranch" sauce. It was good but I think there are some other sauces that would compliment the chicken better. The chicken is incredible. name: The Side Door Grill and Tap
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Nigal Gahtham', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104593498598918446795/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0lJ8XEILXR2f_e5Q8XFJc_nQTJ9oAo1ATJdiK2WWIhzlwN9In1g=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Showed up at opening time and food was cooked perfectly and was delicious! I got the Side Door Burger and it was probably my fav burger if not 2nd to be honest. The fries are crispy battered and perfectly salted! The cider beer I got was refreshing and delicious!', 'time': 1758492138, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Aj Sue', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116908335786274825200/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRD7dveO5FFknx11BQguYIJt6f8tqwJ-wPoW4OuTz_r20FC3u3Mg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "Side Door Grill is a good hearty simple American Food place with an impressive beer selection and a very knowledgeable staff.

There's always a beer of the day that you can get a great deal on a pitcher...

Food is Burgers, basics, fish fry on Saturday (add$1.50 and make your fish fry all-you-can-eat!). They also serve tots four different ways. And several tempting dessert choices too.

Indoor seating is good... The place is as little dark and full of interesting memorabilia/flair... Nice setting for a clandestine meeting/date I think.

Outdoor seating is pleasant with tables closer to the sidewalk offering some nice people watching.

This is just off of state street so parking is easy if you don't mind walking a couple of blocks.", 'time': 1682793225, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chadwick Domack', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107862477594070670023/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXt6m9ttY9zGaFwNiaXkxRlfu5AWbzZyxvuW6FNk9lKx9xxH188Mg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': "If you're looking for a good burger, I would highly recommend this spot. They are located right through the main entrance to the building on the main level. It's a smaller place, but lots of character. The service was fast, and the food was delicious. Burgers here will absolutely fill you up.", 'time': 1718737067, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kevin Revolinski', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110351347610789941612/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2YDh14iMkiQUJKAuE6ANltT_Aa1VxxQwveZjvK1ZyyJBGiW5P=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "We've been going here for years and never understood why it is never crowded. They share a kitchen with Samba.", 'time': 1691807937, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Wuliao Hao', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111097909400072694721/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5_MUlwXo-2U-oNMXzaWnmLvBZk9-Le9Is74ItqSJlZslBFrFR=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 years ago', 'text': 'It is an attached restaurant of Sumba upstairs.
