name: Tailwinds
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Danielle Gee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112190542656682314058/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUv8dGufN5VraDmscX_uE3bePXfRwgr37PHdIpv6Jje3AlUQu66tA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'I ordered a garden salad with chicken and a side of cheese curds, along with a peach mojito. While the salad was basic, the cheese curds stole the show – they were absolutely amazing! The outside was perfectly light and crispy, and each bite was delicious. Even though the restaurant was pretty busy and service was a bit slow, the staff were incredibly kind and attentive, which made the experience even better. If you’re visiting, do yourself a favor and get the cheese curds – they’re totally worth it!', 'time': 1728617689, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chassidy Comella', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103145869315435259533/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBFSwRHWXFFLOWf0udMh0E_K6djNBYnUn_yBSFx6EKEczMwhdqHQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 years ago', 'text': 'My husband and I played date night roulette and ended up here for Valentines day. It did not disappoint!

The rules: we had to ask the waitor their 2 favorite dishes and order them. Austin was spot on with these choices! The steak was incredible!

One of our new favorite places. We will be back.

Update: we took our Buffalo and Blue cheese chips home, kept them in the fridge for over 24 hours, threw then in the airfryer on high for 5 minutes and they were fantastic!', 'time': 1645039944, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Bri M', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105994740541756878481/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvzWA4N1lg-XgeY-UB_nVNjYqt5w5tA_hynNhHCAwP4SOWqdIN=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '11 months ago', 'text': 'Very slow service on weekend but friendly staff. reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Olivia Fletcher', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115650734364272445385/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyTzxM03z5HlPJFxh_5kr0foM-xUQ9nS3EggkYi1fD-q9DRWeH=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Food was excellent, really a cool space, we did wait awhile for our food to arrive, but it was also a busier game day, but worth the wait!', 'time': 1768496719, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jerry Murphy', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118281719075764774358/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8C1ZJTLj9LbLzhTjt0QET2wzxMijjHOCSrazQs29QzMMAWQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Had not been to B&B for a while, so we stopped in after being lucky enough to find a parking space.  Had fish fry and chicken club sandwich. Also tried something new: cioppino, a seafood stew, which resembled a Manhatten seafood chowder. It was very good. Our server ( Celine Dijon K ) was great.', 'time': 1738376228, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Ndaziona Ndafooka', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110700728302577754725/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXX-Ih6-zhhlIbu_dvL85wpVOj1rEoKLyVZvAkAJQeXg3Za7Uof=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': "Came in at 1030am on a Saturday with my husband and kids (1yo & 7yo) for brunch. Calm atmosphere with music playing, no one seemed bothered by my children's age level lack of inside voice or fussing. I also nurses baby with no cover. Kids menu was provided which included activity word search, maze and coloring. High chairs were new and clean. Food was made fresh but came out quickly   highly recommend the Ace Space Blood orange hard apple cider. Delicious!! If you are there for their brunch Saturday/Sunday from 10-2pm you won't be disappointed.", 'time': 1718470915, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Justin Marwitz', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108031978577898142312/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpsAA82Qhg07AplAu2nHEW_kJLHL4FYY3b-2puydTtFb7b4p2jnA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "I wasn't sure what to expect but I'm glad I stopped in for lunch. The prices seem a tad high but once you get your dishes, you'll see that it's actually quite reasonable. No complaints about the quality of the food and the quantity was perfect for a filling lunch with a few leftovers. If you're on the fence, I'd say it's absolutely worth stopping in!

There's also a great selection of bears and wines with mixed drinks as well, including a few NA options (the fizzes are tasty!).", 'time': 1692630241, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Aj Sue', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116908335786274825200/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRD7dveO5FFknx11BQguYIJt6f8tqwJ-wPoW4OuTz_r20FC3u3Mg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': 'Omg! The coleslaw was delicious, and I upgraded from fries to a cup of cioppino. I could not have asked for a better meal.

The service was great… Our server was attentive, and always knew when I had food in my mouth 😂!

The atmosphere inside the restaurant in on the patio is wonderful! Beautiful windows, open air spaces, aided by several roll up glass wall doors that they keep open during warm weather

Parking is relatively easy in the mini mall parking lot where the bear and bottle rear entry is… Street parking may be a little difficult.', 'time': 1685779801, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Meredith Tunison', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103471604849535312711/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV67VIrNY_drAVetRfe_jX62UZ57Ctd6mn-5W56G3BFZYuoBYNr3g=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "The Tip Top Tavern staff graciously accommodated our party of 10 in the little side room area, for a birthday celebration. Our server Kris was thoughtful and helpful. The cheese curds are sooooo good, and my mac and cheese came with a super flavorful, blackened chicken breast. Really good! My husband said his burger was good but not the best he's had recently. Their bar selection is quite nice, and I was able to warm up with a hot toddy even. Yum!", 'time': 1763335731, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Logan Moore', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101766071423209805025/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3beKabqTlLnTVvh6DTv1d0GpeEVlZZ9UTS-ZwcsDaaItIePJ9=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': "We finally made it in to try the fish fry that we've heard about so many times, and it did not disappoint! We arrived at about 6 PM and they said it would be about a 20-minute wait. They had us sat in 5 minutes! I ordered a brandy old fashioned and the fried walleye with fries. Everything was excellent! From the right amount of breading on the fish, to the battered fries and homemade tartar sauce, I was really impressed. The vibe and service are awesome too. We can't stop thinking about our next fish fry at Tip Top!", 'time': 1770766379, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'thisis hybrid', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106558420124318345689/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYDpkPSHXmP_KEldWClBzmI_rL8rQ4QrAliBjLb6hkML2Pja6Y=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'A great little location for some delicious food and a good selection of drinks.

We love going to this restaurant. The food is absolutely delicious and reasonably priced. Small little restaurant with patio seating (highly recommend when it’s nice out). The servings are a great size and the food is absolutely fantastic. We had the cheese curds as an appetizer and they were really good. We had two different burgers, Reuben, and mushroom melt with bacon. This place is dog friendly for those who are inclined to bring their four legged friends. Every time I’m in Madison, we usually make a stop here!', 'time': 1747075287, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Gale McGill', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111043216747703574488/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7K6fFbIQ2d5qcVaJCUwTDFUUlqaxhllEyfZfe5kJ8V0LhDPE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'We had the pleasure of stopping here on a Saturday evening. It is very modest from the exterior, and the parking lot was small, but there was handicapped parking and extra parking on the street.  The interior is lovely, with very tasteful lighting, wallpaper accents and simple seating. The tin ceiling was a treat and the other decor showed an appreciation for art deco with an eclectic vintage vibe.  Well kept and clean, the wait staff was cheerful and busy, but attentive. Great background music had a nice jazzy feel, I found myself nodding to the beat as did the bartender. The menu contains some amusing wordplay, which was appreciated. We ordered “The Rooster” and split it between us.  It was delicious and hit the spot, kind of an elevated BLT with egg. It came with a field green salad nicely dressed. The Summer Spritzer was very refreshing and light.  They also offered a honey lavender lager, which sounded delicious but I was pleasantly full. Although we ate inside, there is also a fairly substantial patio area. This establishment is handicapped friendly with no stairs to navigate. Overall a wonderful dining experience with great service and a relaxing
ambiance.  Highly recommend.', 'time': 1753811165, 'translated': False}]

name: Great Dane Pub & Brewing Co. - Eastside
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'The Great Dane East location has been a consistent staple for take out lunches and often dinner. I have tried almost everything on their menu and what I value about this location is its solid stable consistency on their food and that they maintain a base favorites menu and add in monthly specials on rotation .

Some of my favorites include their chipotle Cajun turkey sandwich with cheese and spinach . The combination works very well and flavors blend beautifully with a side order of waffle fries. Grilled chicken pesto sandwich with mozzarella melted and and a pesto aioli spread on the bread .

For all sandwiches and even their burgers they have gluten free options to choose from .

From their burgers I have tried them all but my favorite is for sure the Texarcana burger with well prepared beef topped with bacon , cheese and a large onion haystack. Really good and definitely filling when adding pub fries or waffle fries.

Parking has been always easy and fast to find in their lot . Ordering online via the app is extremely fast and prompt . Staff has been friendly helpful and courteous at each visit .

Definitely a place I will continue to visit.', 'time': 1768070522, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'S. M. Clark', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105291501439905724396/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWr6NISa_1ZgfK8RLV_utZHdBv3y8fqHB8VWDj5VjEIruhFBwp2=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "Good place for gatherings with friends and family. Service was good and friendly. Twice this year we've eaten there and food was not so great. Over cooked burgers, charred bacon, wrong cheese, dry bread buns. Not terrible but not really top notch either. Culver's burgers are better by comparison. The rueben sandwich is not recommended as it was a bit less in taste and appeal compared to an Arby's rueben. Kids enjoyed mostly the fries. Good place for beers and pretzels and socializing at the bar, which is what Wisconsin is all about. name: Viet Town
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Ashani Stevens', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117952759788075828459/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPRPi035zWlGSSAOxPHYYi4_8CHRJFCA0fPgzdRYub0hgP0bQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': 'Had a great first experience here.
We were greeted warmly, and the staff were very attentive and kind throughout our meal.
I ordered a rare steak and meatball pho (fried egg added for an additional $2) and my partner ordered the all meat combination pho. Both of our broths were very flavorful by itself, but ofc it wouldn’t pho without all the veggies and the additional sauce condiments- which were nicely organized in a tray on the table.
I also ordered the grilled pork Bahn mi to share between myself and my partner, and all I can say is damn. It was AMAZING. So good in fact that before we left I ordered another to go.
The food was all together delicious, and I also ordered the Thai Tea Boba Jelly drink, and that was also really good. Thai tea tasted fresh and the soft jellies at the top was a fun addition. Came in a colorful plastic (reusable) cup that I got to take home and will use again.
All in all, a great experience. There were so many other things on the menu that looked amazing, so I will be back to try more (and for the pork bahn mi).
Thanks and cheers!', 'time': 1769642762, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jim', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113087374396133323204/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfn3LB5m4fQkrz2gqdGqAZxnoNlynqn-YrGLoSzgPcdKIzC2k=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Update: There are some consistency issues, this time the Bahn Mi definitely had older bread, not airy or crunchy. Fell apart like it's been sitting a while, not a lot of paté this time either. When it's good, it's very good, but I guess it's a hit or miss. I'll have to downgrade the food score unfortunately.

Original review: I've had their viet town bahn mi now 2 times, and I am really surprised at how good it is. I'm really picky about the asian food in madison, which I feel alot could be better. But this place, Ive had the bahn mi at the restaurant and delivery now, and both times it blew my mind Madison has this. Crispy airy bread (something people dont tend to get right), and the perfect amount of pate, to meat, to vege's ratio. I may have to say its the best bahn mi in madison right now. I feel like I'm taking crazy pills but I really think its that good. Only downside is its quite expensive.", 'time': 1763930424, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Carol F', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109582556008310294080/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHrt7_ag9y8ahqbBheaqEZmFPCussmMMu81MZBhtVIPnaSZA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Wanted to try some Pho for the first time. The food was amazing. The service was great, very friendly. I was left very impressed. Enjoyed every bite of my plate. Definitely became one of my favorite restaurants.', 'time': 1768203900, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Ah Mau', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100730653384754328254/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4WB7ISHLFZnibOCOSNd65wdjgRPqZCvrAdZ6tlJhBWQjnOw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "I got the beef bahn mi and bun bo hue. Overall this experience was 4/5.

Beef bahn mi: delicious! I'm not sure if it's true or not, but i heard that the bread is baked in house. Regardless, absolutely delicious! The bread is just slight flakey and toasty and holds all the fillings well. The fillings, pate, mayo, and bread ratio is on point! Additionally, the meat is so beautifully marinated and flavorful! Do not expect a bland experience if you get their bahn mi. I even had the regular meatloaf bahn mi, and that was as equally delicious. I didn't snag a picture, but that is most definitely because it was that good. 5/5!

Bun bo hue: hmm... I have mixed feelings on this one unfortunately. First things first, it does taste good, but it really isn't very spicy at all. If anything it is actually a little bit sweet. Flavors aside, another thing i liked was how clean they prepared the pork shank or hock (tbh idrk which exactly, but it was pork and there was a big boney center with pork skin and cartilage all around). I've had experiences from other locations where this pork shank still has a little of hair on it still, which is fine but I personally just dont prefer it. Anyways, Viet Town did a great job cleaning all the meat thoroughly and i appreciate that very much. Overall, there was a lot of care and attention paid to the broth. I provided a photo of a tiny shrimp they add to the broth as a base ingredient for flavor. One more note about the broth though, it is a little bit on the oilier side. I don't mind it, but others may. The only thing that really disappointed me from this dish was the serving size of the noodles in comparison to the broth. There is plenty of broth in a serving size, but the amount of noodles i had to go with it were disproportionate. Imagine about 1/3 cup of Vermicelli noodles with about 6 cups of broth... Thankfully there were lots of cabbage and beanspouts to enjoy the broth with too, but for the price of nearly $20 for a bowl, that's just not okay. Hopefully this was an odd event and not the common case with Viet Town, because it really is a milder, but tasty dish! 3/5.", 'time': 1760916826, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Aric B', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111658112692550842367/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFje8YbhnnaAWPHu-6YlV_1ragLiJW-xYB_fz7t3i8-SyXtEY=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'The service was awesome, they were super nice and they have this doorbell you can ring if you ever need anything.  The restaurant was very clean and they had many condiments at the table.

We had the Flank Pho which has a ton of noodles and our only complaint was that the meat was too fatty.  The broth was delicious and it was a lot of food.  We also had the R4 Shaking Beef with rice which was amazing and I would get it again in a heartbeat.

I am excited to come back and try some more options.', 'time': 1756857737, 'translated': False}]

I ordered take out for the 1st time for delivery when I usually order and pick it up. I didn\'t have a vehicle so I ordered thru Grubhub (which was on time). When I received the food it was cold and the california and yellowtail scallion rolls were not fresh. I also ordered the wrong roll (handroll) by mistake but accepted that fact. The salmon roll (regular) was ok. I always get my japanese food from them. The beef Negi maki was hard to chew, not fresh and cold. You only get 6 pieces for $15 with no rice or anything!! It was cold in a container as if they were just dumped in there. The seaweed salad was not fresh and it was missing the  sweetness seaweed has. I strongly suspect that the food was prepared as soon as I ordered but sat there for possibly an hour or so because it was the way the food looked and tasted. I called and the receptionist was very rude and uninterested. I asked for a refund on those items and asked for a manager who they said was not there but will be in about 7:30pm. I asked for someone in charge which she claimed there was no one else available!  They hung up on me, lied to me regarding the whereabouts of the manager, Amanda. So, when I called back \'Andy" was also rude and said the manager will be in the next day. I called 4 times and each time they were rude or had me on hold for at least 20 min. So, I just called Amanda this morning and she is also argumentative and said she was too busy to talk to me because they just opened and customers where arriving. However, she admitted that she did get the message but felt 8:30pm was too late to call me last night..really?!! I asked \'What about me, I\'m a customer too that has been ordering from and coming to dine there for more than 15 years!! Since they moved to their new and bigger location, I don\'t find the staff as friendly or attentive. Sometimes, the food is \'off\' lately but they showed concern and would fix the issue. Luckily, I was able to contact Grubhub last night. They were very helpful and understanding to the issue. I received my refund from Grubhub. Thank you Grubhub for your assistance. I had to throw everything away accept the salmon roll. I will not be a patron of Niji Asian Cuisine in Madison, WI ever again. name: La Taguara
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'I have been doing take out from La Taguara for years : these guys just never disappoint. I was surprised to realize I had never left a review .

La Taguara on East Wash has been my go to lunch spot for so many years that I have tried almost every thing on the menu . However my
Main two favorites for lunch are consistently either the empanadas or the pastelitos. This week I got the pastelito with beef and a side of fries . The pastelito is a cousin of the empanada : but it’s made with wheat flour instead of corn . Filling of beef ( or any others like chicken or basic cheese) are spot on. Not too heavy but just enough to give a good fill for lunch. The sauces they make here are awesome especially the green guasacaca sauce of theirs is bursting with flavor and pairs with both the pastelito and also with the empanadas.

Continue doing what you are doing ! name: The Boathouse
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Stacy Matousek', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109180842465999034296/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9D3YyJpTkNqCBmEWDX3S-Kl3Jixq6d4VOLLwl7Zpu6CNZAkCAKA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'This was a cool place we found. We only had an appetizer and a soda . The cheese curds were awesome. Our service was ehh, They werent real busy when we arrived but it seemed like our server could never be found. He never brought our dipping sauce and we couldnt tell him because he couldnt be found. When he finally came back we were about done eating so we just said forget it. Im sure its a great place in the summer being on the water and all.', 'time': 1768137644, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'MKB', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118067365178890644688/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2W-KVZbmkrO2uStXpphjy_VC47afo2u3kxED6Jc5SRBbmYdwF9w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "What a view!

We had lunch there on a Wednesday afternoon.

We parked a little over a block away.  Free street parking.  I could see if it was busy parking could be a problem.  As far as I know I don't' think the restaurant offers parking?

The restaurant is located in a hotel, on the bottom two floors.  The first floor was closed.  The lower floor has a small bar area with an outdoor terrace right on Lake Mendota.

There were one or two open tables but the receptionist said either they were holding them for reservations or something about the waitress was slammed earlier and taking a break?  She said we could wait 15 min or take a table in the bar area.  It was such a nice weather day that we decided to wait.  In less than 10 minutes she ended up giving us one of the tables that was originally open.

My wife had a Blue Moon beer which she said was super cold and very good.

We ordered some chips and salsa and enjoyed the excellent view.

There were about 2 or 3 birds which took an interest in our chips and were annoying, but what do you expect being outside.

The chips and salsa were ok.  They advertised the chips were made in-house.  I thought they needed more salt and could be a bit crisper.  I enjoyed that the salsa was pureed, but we both agreed it was a bit bland.

My wife had the shrimp roll with chips.  I had the cheeseburger with up- charged $2 fries.

She said her sandwich was good but could use less cucumbers and more shrimp but would get it again.

I ordered my cheeseburger plain with just cheese.  It was done medium which I prefer. The patty was thicker than normal but a bit smaller than the bun.
It appeared they attempted to toast the bun but it was not crisp.  It was ok but would try something different next time.  The fries were a bit underdone and semi warm.  Would not get them again.

I would go back again to enjoy the outstanding view.", 'time': 1756572931, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Vikram Bala', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118263460813448768909/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAuKPVKQIpv-7RzfteWfuE5DFV1gf-TGuFuvANkazzlq4nzbZ6Qg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': "The atmosphere is absolutely phenomenal! If you get an outdoor seat 🪑, you are literally right on the lake and have spectacular views! The cheese 🧀 curds were mouth-watering 👄. MY OH MY, I could eat those every single day!! That being said, my sandwich 🥪 wasn't great. Seems like you gotta order the right item from the menu. Either way, it's definitely worth a visit, even if it's just for a peaceful, scenic dinner 🍽️ on the lake.", 'time': 1750381370, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'B. Perna', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108594294679126409375/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJF9RmN_t80iuO4pMg8O9p9Ned7iIL9Ib9BPyXOq62wNqYDk0cf=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': "Our recent lunch at the Boathouse Restaurant was a truly enjoyable experience, easily earning a solid four-star rating. The highlights were the delicious and fresh seafood. Every bite tasted like it had just come from the water, a testament to their sourcing and preparation.
Adding to the culinary delight were the excellent views from the patio. Dining with such a picturesque waterfront backdrop truly elevated the entire meal. It's the perfect spot to relax and soak in the atmosphere while savoring your food.
Finally, the fast service was a welcome surprise. Our server was attentive and efficient, ensuring we had everything we needed without feeling rushed. This made for a seamless and pleasant dining experience.
For a delicious and fresh seafood lunch with great views and prompt service, the Boathouse Restaurant is an excellent choice and highly recommended.", 'time': 1744547345, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Whole', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108906445703972643307/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXo-a61HFEhXUEbw4U8rpLbIHS5Mf8JWGx7SSMqbkUvD8AxKSY=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'Easily one of my favorite spots of my entire trip to Madison! It was beautiful, you can sit directly on the water and enjoy the views as well as walk out on the dock and get a taste of the breeze.

The server was wonderful, extremely kind and helpful. The Wisco burger was delicious, I devoured it quickly, the bacon jam was drippy but complimented the cheese well. All of my group members enjoyed their dishes.

You have to walk down quite a bit of stairs to reach this restaurant. Bathrooms are located right outside the restaurant when you enter, they are very clean.', 'time': 1750112829, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Jerry Murphy', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118281719075764774358/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8C1ZJTLj9LbLzhTjt0QET2wzxMijjHOCSrazQs29QzMMAWQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "After trying their food at Taste of Madison, we had to go. Be sure to try their take on cheese curds, done tempura-style on a stick.", 'time': 1763861557, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Hao Yuan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112769440056822775865/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiyHEoIoo--JKM5GebIu4XaMnJh7R2B5bBmxosTVqmH3Q0Pos=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Came here during happy hour a few weeks ago when Concerts on the Square was happening and had a great time. While it wasn’t very busy when I first arrived, it quickly became packed. Despite how slammed they got, it was clear there was a good system in place as all of the appetizers and drinks that I ordered came out quickly. Everything tasted fresh, and there’s a variety of options to choose from.

Special shout out to Tandra who was apparently the only bartender working at the time. I’ve never seen someone manage the blistering pace of drink orders coming in from both the main dining room and the full bar as efficiently as her. My experience that day made me want to come here more often.', 'time': 1754841896, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Wendy Kirkpatrick', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116070561075504450049/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqA29uXn9y-kRhdZfKkjpzKMqfaI5dBeEgBXK_SCUovLXVcFnK=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': 'in the last week', 'text': 'Surprisingly poor experience. We ordered the veggie tempura roll and dragon roll. The veggie tempura roll is a similar puree of vegetables (no tempura) in a very chewy rice roll. Tasted less fresh than the grocery store or the airport (out of a plastic box). We also had the dragon roll which was very fishy. I tried to just eat the avocado and it tasted fishy too.

We found Billy Idol "Dancing with myself" to be an odd choice of music for dinner at a sushi restaurant.

We only ate a portion of the food and then left to go home and eat. Try Muramoto at Hilldale. name: The Great Dane Pub & Brewing Company
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'I stopped in for a pickup order few days ago as I wanted to do take out on a Friday night . The ordering app is very easy and convenient.

Ordered a Texarcana burger and their Cajun turkey sandwich, both with waffle fries as a substitute for regular French fries .

Food was warm, well seasoned a for take it it was  very well cooked even upon arriving home .

Texarcana burger is prepared to your preference of doneness . Crispy onions haystacks in between bacon sharp cheddar and a bbq sauce that is not too sweet and ties everything together .

Turkey sandwich is Cajun style and this was my favorite of the two . Combination of juicy turkey breast thinly sliced with a Cajun run not overpowering. Bacon chipotle and melted cheddar add to the sandwich a beautiful flavor profile. Adding the waffle fries as a substitute gives this a crunchy and over the top great sandwich.

I would definitely try this again .

Only challenge is the parking . Restaurant is located on a main road and parking you need to rely on street parking which can be tricky depending on the time of day .

Once you place a take out order the pickup time is very quick which is an extra bonus for the Great Dane !', 'time': 1766237696, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tim Ponds', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103998437311129346524/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgh3uyN36xrCtUZ1hxtJWWQHKWHPPAxrNlXioGjLsmXLGtbg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I was frequent business traveler this summer. I stayed at the Embassy Suites around the corner. This was my go to spot 1-2 times each week. The food was delicious and in summer time I really enjoyed the Strawberry tart beer and the pretzel board appetizer. Once summer was over I enjoyed the German Pilsner since I’m not much of an IPA drinker. I highly recommend you order the full size Liter since you’re likely to order more than one pint. I always had friendly hosts and servers. Once college started there were a couple servers that were less than par but I took it in stride as we all were new at our jobs at one point. I dined on the patio garden area twice. I brought my English Cream Golden once and he really loved it too!  I highly recommend this place.', 'time': 1760728514, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tina J', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114277128082520265040/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKaBLk8RZOgHwQHDRC-MgE9Ff2LXjsTDZewe0G5Pf8FHlpi2Q=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 weeks ago', 'text': 'Dinner with family here was great. The food was terrible across the board. Everything came out cold and completely lacking flavor. The tortilla soup was basically just a bowl of tortilla strips with barely any broth. The salad was bland, with tasteless dressing, and the nachos were somehow even worse — cold cheese, mostly covered in sour cream, and hardly any actual toppings. I genuinely don’t understand how a restaurant can mess up nachos and a salad this badly. Forgot the dressing for the side salad. Breadstick was hard and over cooked. Quesadilla was soggy.

On top of that, I was given a hard time about using a free appetizer coupon that I received via email. The coupon clearly stated that you could show the email to your server to redeem it. Despite this, the staff argued that it was only valid through the app. Even after pointing out the wording on the coupon, they went back and forth between an employee and a manager before reluctantly applying it and even then, they only took $10 off instead of comping the appetizer as advertised. It was unnecessarily frustrating and felt like they were just trying not to honor their own promotion.

The restaurant itself is in rough shape. The carpet looked old and dirty, the booths and tables were worn down, and the entire place felt neglected and in serious need of an update.

The staff’s appearance was also unprofessional. Baggy jeans hanging down and sweatshirts don’t exactly inspire confidence or cleanliness. The manger had long snake finger nails, a snake necklace, and looked like someone from the circus. Fast-food places like Chick-fil-A and Subway manage to look more put together than this.

Overall, this location feels rundown, poorly managed, and not worth the money. name: Baldwin Street Grille
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'L. Smith', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100810424533228838742/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTdVqYBhfBdDibmMZOnivltdaeIb0WK9e8NszsIZqJlR7VVBY=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Nice neighborhood bar/grill.

Food was decent.
- My extremely fussy daughter loved her BSG wrap w/ Honey Mustard sauce and the sweet potato fries.
- My husband enjoyed his chicken sandwich and onion rings. The onion rings were coated with an unusual paprika, maybe a little bit of cinnamon batter. They could’ve been more crispy.
- I had the Reuben with french fries. Was not the best Ruben I’ve ever had. It would’ve been better if it wasn’t burnt. I would suggest a thicker rye bread, it was a little messy to eat. The french fries were good.
- My daughter and I enjoyed the lemonade. My husband enjoyed the options of beer they had on tap.

Atmosphere:
- A small comfortable  place for lunch. Consists of a handful of booths, tables and room at the bar. I believe you can slot gamble and there is a pool table.
- there was a movie playing on the screen. The around sound was excellent. The husband and daughter thought the volume was a little loud. Perhaps if there were more people in the establishment. It would not have been a negative. (there was just us at a table and three or four people at the bar.)

Bathroom:
My daughter and I recommend that you don’t use the bathroom. I would have to say that it smelled worse than my great great grandparents double hole outhouse (the bane of old buildings ). On the positive side, it was as clean as they would be able to get that area clean and it was well stocked.

Service was great.', 'time': 1759236968, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Daniel Brodzik', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100748936596246986684/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLt2snjii4vRJ0tDnhUByfQUEAg_7By8ey4ADhBJO058clOyg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "Saw the stellar reviews, decided to check it out while I was exploring Madison and the nearby arcade. The staff are amazing - welcoming and entertaining. They’ll joke with you and make you feel like family.

Food - Excellent (5 Stars)
Service - Other than (1) bartender (5 Stars)
Atmosphere - (4 Stars)

(BARTENDER SERVICE)
(1=BoaPT / 5=Rest of the Staff)

Everyone except for (1) bartender is great. This (1) particular Bartender on a Power Trip (BoaPT).

I give “Service” NO SCORE as it wouldn’t be fair to the rest of the exceptional staff and workers of the Villa Tap. Although, in my comments above I rated the Service other than 1 person as a 5.

This is an issue as I always eat at the bar and have generally eat there on Fridays except for when I’m out of town. I started going to VT in end of May 2025 and have been going there for about 6 months…(estimate) and last night was the last straw with this (BoaPT). This hasn’t been an isolated incident with particular bartender. I will only speak for myself and not for what others have observed.  I’ve been to the VT about 20 times and spent around $80 per visit for an estimated $1600 during that period of time.

This is my 1st NEGATIVE review of service in over 35 years of going to restaurants and dealing with bartender's eating at the bar. It NOT because I waited on a drink or food. It is truly unfortunate for myself, because the food and service all except for
(1-BoaPT) is very nice.

I work hard for my money working with Medical Professionals and Staff in a service roll and (I WOULD NEVER TREAT A CUSTOMER THAT WAY)

I have thought about this post now for a couple hours…and vacillated on whether or not I should post. In the end I think it my post only draws attention to (1) and not the whole, but this (1) has ruined my experience at VT and the only way I can speak up is through this review and where I spend my discretionary dollars.", 'time': 1763222110, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kevin Campbell', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114073096926491312040/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaWD8i5mXaZLPcAlNxmk3Gzr75nguS1qmkGctdl_iQxh3dyv2I=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '11 months ago', 'text': 'Ole School family Pub with a great vibe and Amazing Friday fish fry. reviews:

A white sided single floor with a couple of signs that let you know where they are. Plenty of parking out front.
It was mid morning on the Wednesday before Thanksgiving. There were several other small groups inside. The interior is bright and cheerful. Got a friendly greeting as we gave our orders. I got a London Fog Tea Latte (little lavender, little vanilla, extra foam), along with a Morning Bun. Got the drink in a mug and the pastry heated up.
The London Fog was good but not great. It was a little weak and could have used more steeping. It was also warm but not hot. The Morning Bun was delicious. Lots of cinnamon and great texture. The noise level was a little loud, but we still let us have a casual conversation.
Would stop back next time I am in the neighborhood. name: Ledger Coffee Roasters
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'PowSmackBlam', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109688822172675529546/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7rnbuD4HBjBj-UEet0ku660snxDRyxYObWZdh35kUPNY_waQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '4 weeks ago', 'text': 'I’m done. Ledger, we need to talk.

I love your coffee. Your staff is great. But the cups and lids are a real problem. They leak badly, and it’s not a one-off. I’ve had hot coffee spill all over my car, permanently damage it, and ruin a favorite jacket along with other clothes. After mentioning it to staff, the response was basically, “That’s what we’ve got.”

That’s not good enough.

If the only way to drink your coffee without it leaking everywhere is to bring my own cup, I’m out. I shouldn’t have to workaround a basic packaging failure. I’ve been to Ledger at least 12 times, and every single visit my hot coffee has leaked from the lid, no matter how tightly it’s clamped.

This is a shame, because I genuinely like the service and the product. But I’ve been burned literally and financially, and I’m not willing to risk it again.

Please fix the cups and lids. I’d love to come here every day.', 'time': 1769268002, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Justin Jones', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108872259906663756193/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-X_B5_aKOSFpVMiM8jfTibvbSYNT6_VPe8Rct-wuGxbxSbSI=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'This is a cool coffee spot in the Garver Feed Mill. I’ve had really good coffee from here and some just ok. I’ll have to go a third time to get a real sample size. It’s usually not too busy on week day mornings, but if you do go at that time there is no where to sit inside because the atrium is closed. On the weekends the atrium is open and there is both indoor and outdoor seating. I do really like the outdoor seating options.', 'time': 1726953442, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Gina W.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111043819670484088930/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXq0HVGWHF-OU2GLq9fiM3aFIbULOgletyv1EyjKPiU81zy25iMqg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 years ago', 'text': "This past Saturday, I placed a pick-up order for a dozen Level 5 donuts in Boston cream, cherry almond, chai, blueberry lemon, and chocolate. Can I gush about these here?? I could not take enough pictures of these gorgeous donuts between stuffing my face with bites of them, especially luxuriating in the rich amounts of pastry cream in the Boston. Insane!  All of Caitlin's flavors are fresh and bright, true to their word and never artificial tasting. They are never too subtle or too prominent.  The middles are soft and the outsides are just a little bit crispy and I am so glad she is in my town making donuts! All her donuts are vegan, and you can special order gluten-free donuts for pick-up as well... I have had them at festivals she's participated in and they are excellent. You can order through her website, or just get to Ledger before they run out. I recommend a dozen though, because these donuts are binge-worthy. name: Zippy Lube Coffee, Donuts, and Fried Chicken
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Anthony Schleck', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109703226884842533093/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnIEFHuF6gxnAbf_u9SjiPc8grWAqNsJ0NOhkmdRHwndKV6hBdDg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'The fried chicken was amazing! So crunchy and juicy. Honestly some of the best chicken I’ve had in a while. Donuts were sublime too and so many options. Great coffee.', 'time': 1768681322, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Justin McBrearty', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110410185921549433684/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlb5D5D-ZJgsVw-74XMXAqsONHmeBiqM0bYR6DR3Gtm1wdoQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'The building was formerly an auto mechanic shop, which explains the name and gives the place a unique, quirky style. I’d read rave reviews about their fried chicken sandwich and donuts, so I decided to stop by. I ordered the fried chicken sandwich ($9) and a chocolate cake donut with buttercream icing ($1.50).

The sandwich was excellent—the breading was thick and crunchy, which I really enjoyed. The cake donut was also delicious, with a rich chocolate flavor and smooth buttercream on top, and the price is reasonable.

There’s plenty of parking, a few outdoor tables with umbrellas, and some indoor seating as well. The staff behind the counter were super friendly and welcoming. If I’m in the area again, I’d definitely stop in for another fried chicken sandwich.', 'time': 1754775998, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Los Reviews', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106851214653187191870/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzgD59HGc44LOekhk9aPEQ_HuyAXAZKuXr3mIKojiYA-j4dzd1=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'If you haven’t been here, what are you even doing?
Great food, great price and great service.

Let me start off by talking about their cauliflower “wings” because we went there for a chicken sandwich and these alternative chicken bites took over the show. We love trying new things and cauliflower bites aren’t anything I’ve ever cared for but now its definitely in our list.

The chicken sandwich is a must try, if you like the heat I recommend their spicy chicken sandwich. It is consistent with the flavor since the first time we ever got it.

To be completely honest We tried all their donuts when they first opened and we didn’t care for them, little too dry and very small selection.
I can tell you for a fact that wasn’t the case when we went recently. I completely regret not grabbing more passion fruit donuts and the strawberry chocolate donuts because they were definitely unique and full of flavor. Their donut selection doubled in size if not it tripled. Very happy to try the new flavors definitely need to go try all the other ones.

The only complaint I have is the large side portion of the mac and cheese is over priced. Unless they make their pasta from scratch that side is too small for $8.', 'time': 1716131210, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Shannon W.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111354522713428148040/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUViI5Ofme47ZeYqMGYp7jiHKXbA6_2hlOaW8FSSQz3khIZvXac=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'What a happy little neighborhood spot! Small menu, but everything on it is great. Perfect for a little breakfast treat or a more substantial lunch. The spicy chicken sandwich is a must and the cake donuts have a great texture — little bit of crunch on the outside, soft and not dry on the inside, with just the right amount of sweetness. Viva la Zippy Lube! 🧡', 'time': 1767551001, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chris Anthony', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115888169883009115238/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQAwLaW5jwHQGs6-fwCzRW6_LbIXgZTtl1n6Jo2XJvxzoly205=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': 'I’ve ordered the chicken sandwich from this place several times now and each time it’s been loaded with pickles and enough sauce. Been A+ each time. Definitely recommend extra pickles, they are amazing.

Tried their cauliflower sandwich today. Love that they don’t charge extra for a vegetarian option - the sandwich had great flavor and a good crunch. My wife leans towards vegetarian and I can’t wait for her to try it, she’s going to love it.', 'time': 1703877493, 'translated': False}]

name: The Victory Madison
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'YOGI88 “YOGI88”', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106998083974495397677/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoBJu-h3-E3aVj9JL80gfyOrCR4ozWhFVbcOrQ6F7IoL4-xBJ6=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Cool spot! The glazed donuts where dense and so delicious! My new favorite spot for a glazed. Staff was easy going, polite, and helpful. Chill spot for a meet-up, light meal.', 'time': 1756859004, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Daniel Fogel', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116431745621029673792/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVs2zq7DbBKEPHJhGg-aTPNbgtlPQF1LWczJmXY1hSv7NalQ8PtUQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I regret never going here in the before (the fire) times and I really was never sure it was a cafe because of the signage. Fast forward to 2025, the place is all new, and owner Patrick gave a compelling interview on Citycast Madison that put this spot on my radar.

It’s really cool inside, you could shoot a movie in there. Make sure you look up. The ceiling is shiny and exquisite.

The coffee is from Anodyne, a fave from Milwaukee. You’ll love it. In case you are wondering, they have brewed iced tea too.

Everyone working there is super friendly and they play terrific music

I haven’t met Patrick yet, but I know I will eventually

10 out of 5. Recommend', 'time': 1759274953, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Meansween', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105071846360935475003/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVffXUC3ihAk8Nr_70-QEYGJNca-bGMOlEMxFy7dAdwFPZsN2BryQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': "Great little East side coffee shop with Level 5 Donuts from Wednesday through Sunday, so delicious and vegan too!  I love the coconut cold foam latte as well as the smoked salmon panini and waffles.

This is not a cookie cutter corporate coffee shop as stated by other reviewers.  It's locally owned by Patrick who is such a nice guy, neighborhood vibes, fun staff and music.  I'll definitely be back.", 'time': 1724074651, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Ali Beemsterboer', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109733635314570050101/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV092kIzk7to2Xjgaj_qOahvrP9CYvLp3QsLHhZmMcADe8H8WiAtw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'The Victory is the first coffee shop I entered in Madison that felt like my kind of place. Quaint, unique, cozy, small town vibes (across from a great bookstore too!)

The first time I went, I was having a stressful day job hunting but the owner, Patrick, greeted me, and made me feel welcome. He did more than say hi. He took time to ask about my day and hear about my job hunt.

Life got crazy, fast forward like a year and I’m on my way to Victory again and it is closed due to a fire!! I was devastated.

But! The Victory is up and running again and just as lovely. My siblings and I call it a vortex, because it’s like anything could happen there. We once found a leaf bug on our car when leaving.

The coffee is perfectly roasted with a slight bitter bite and the baristas will remember you and chat (if you want). Also, what is the deal with the Americana waffle??? It’s so frickin good. Go try it.', 'time': 1758165454, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Richard Davidson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112441002573274589355/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeIN3Cj6yLOZVH3jEmzYUlBcodckQx_CpcK2CpfKiN_knLjpcK=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 years ago', 'text': 'Cool funky vibe and great coffee. The barista recommended a turmeric latte of some sort and though I was quite hesitant I decided to try it and am super glad I did...super good. Also, the egg, tomato and pesto sandwich was super good too, the bread could have been a bit fluffier for my preference but it was still very good.', 'time': 1597000781, 'translated': False}]

Upon going in I ran to the bathroom while we waited. The floors were sticky throughout the entire restaurant. I took less than 5 minutes in the bathroom. When I came out my boyfriend was still standing there waiting for anyone to talk to him. There was nobody else inside. There was a worker behind the counter. She was completely ignoring him and a 2nd costumer until 3rd costumer walked in. Upon getting our food it was cold and haphazardly thrown in the bag. Our fries were spilled and sideways. The most irritating part of this whole situation was half my chicken nuggets were missing. Out of the 16 nuggets I ordered and paid for I only received 8. We also only ordered 2 ranch sauces and they threw 10 different sauces in the bag and forgot my ranch. I normally love ***** ***** but this place makes me never want to eat it again.'}]]
